33404.title: The Granular Origins of Inflation
33404.authors: Santiago Alvarez-Blaser, Raphael Auer, Sarah M. Lein, Andrei A. Levchenko
33404.abstract: This paper uses barcode-level price data for 16 advanced and emerging market countries over the period 2005–2022 to investigate the role of individual firms and product categories in aggregate inflation. We decompose inflation into the component due to macroeconomic shocks and the granular residuals capturing the impact of individual firms and product categories, respectively. In advanced economies, the firm granular residual accounts for 41% of the variance of overall inflation, while the product category granular residual accounts for another 15%. Most of the variation in the firm granular residual is due to idiosyncratic shocks rather than to higher sensitivity of larger firms to common shocks. In the cross-section of countries, granular residuals are less important in economies with less concentrated market shares and higher inflation, such as emerging markets. Granular forces also contributed to the post-COVID inflation surge, with the firm-level component explaining roughly one-third of the 2021–2022 inflation in advanced economies. Finally, granularities are associated with a more sluggish response of inflation to monetary policy shocks, suggesting that market concentration can influence monetary non-neutrality.
33404.zh_abstract: 本文利用2005年至2022年间16个发达和新兴市场国家的条形码级价格数据，研究个体企业和产品类别在总体通胀中的作用。我们将通胀分解为宏观经济冲击导致的成分，以及分别捕捉个体企业和产品类别影响的颗粒残差。在发达经济体中，企业颗粒残差解释了总体通胀方差的41%，而产品类别颗粒残差则解释了另外15%。企业颗粒残差的大部分变化是由特质性冲击导致的，而非大型企业对共同冲击的敏感性更高所致。在国家截面数据中，颗粒残差在市场集中度较低且通胀率较高的经济体（如新兴市场）中重要性较低。颗粒力量也助推了疫情后的通胀飙升，企业层面的成分解释了发达经济体2021-2022年通胀的大约三分之一。最后，颗粒性与通胀对货币政策冲击的反应更为迟缓相关，这表明市场集中度会影响货币非中性。
33404.meta: Programs：EFG, IFM, ME；JEL：E31, E32, L11, L16

33403.title: Understanding Racial Disparities in Criminal Court Outcomes
33403.zh_title: 理解刑事法庭结果中的种族差异
33403.authors: Shawn Bushway, Andrew Jordan, Derek Neal, Steven Raphael
33403.abstract: We construct a framework that defines optimal outcomes in criminal courts, and we use this framework to interpret and organize the existing literature on racial disparities in pretrial detention, sentencing, and community corrections outcomes. Existing research indicates that some actors within courts and within the agencies that implement the sentences that courts impose make decisions that are contaminated by racial animus or racially biased assessments of the recidivism risks posed by some offenders. However, the most important sources of racial disparities in case outcomes are numerous practices, regulations, and laws that are too punitive, i.e. their social costs are likely greater than any derived social benefits. Since minorities, especially Blacks, face arrest at much higher rates than whites, they bear large disparate impacts from such policies.
33403.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个定义刑事法庭最优结果的框架，并利用该框架来解释和整理关于审前拘留、量刑和社区矫正结果中种族差异的现有文献。现有研究表明，法庭内部以及执行法庭判决的机构中的一些行为者，其决策受到了种族敌意或对某些罪犯再犯风险的种族偏见评估的污染。然而，案件结果中种族差异的最重要来源是众多过于惩罚性的做法、法规和法律，即它们的社会成本可能大于任何衍生的社会效益。由于少数族裔，尤其是黑人，被逮捕的比率远高于白人，他们承受着此类政策带来的巨大差异性影响。

33402.title: Estimating the Economic and Budgetary Effects of Research Investments
33402.zh_title: 估算研究投资的经济与预算效应
33402.authors: Theresa Gullo, Benjamin Page, David Weiner, Heidi L. Williams
33402.abstract: Many US federal agencies model the economic and budgetary effects of research and development (R&D) investments -- both public R&D and private R&D -- as if R&D were the same as any other form of investment, such as physical capital investment. However, in recent decades a broad base of evidence has developed suggesting that such modeling may result in projections that are not well-aligned with the actual economic and budgetary effects of R&D investments. In this paper, we attempt to synthesize the economic evidence relevant to estimating the economic and budgetary effects of R&D, and examine how and where this research literature could potentially be incorporated into the standard projections produced by various federal agencies.
33402.zh_abstract: 许多美国联邦机构在模拟研发投资（包括公共研发和私人研发）的经济与预算效应时，将其视为与任何其他形式的投资（如实物资本投资）相同。然而，近几十年来，大量证据表明，这种模拟可能导致预测与研发投资的实际经济和预算效应不一致。本文试图综合与估算研发经济与预算效应相关的经济学证据，并探讨该研究文献如何以及在哪些方面可能被纳入各联邦机构的标准预测中。

33401.title: Information and the Welfare Benefits from Differentiated Products
33401.zh_title: 信息与差异化产品的福利收益
33401.authors: Imke Reimers, Christoph Riedl, Joel Waldfogel
33401.abstract: Differentiated product consumption choices made without full information can lead to welfare losses from regret and missed opportunities, but a lack of post-purchase usage data has prevented their exploration. Using novel data on individual ownership and post-purchase usage of video games, we explore both the potential welfare benefits of full information prior to purchase and the ability of contemporary prediction technology to produce these gains. We find large potential gains: Among currently owned games, fully informed consumers could achieve 90 percent of their status quo playtime with 40 percent of current expenditure; and current expenditure reallocated among all available games could double status quo playtime. We develop a tractable model of consumer choice among bundles based on hours of playtime relative to overall spending, which we implement using both a Cobb Douglas calibration and a logit model of bundle choice. Full information would raise consumer surplus by more than the value of status quo expenditure; and it would reduce expenditure by half. Consumers heeding sophisticated, personalized predictions would obtain roughly 40 percent of these welfare benefits with a fifth less spending.
33401.zh_abstract: 在信息不完全的情况下做出的差异化产品消费选择可能导致因后悔和错失机会而产生的福利损失，但缺乏购买后使用数据阻碍了对这些损失的探索。利用关于个人拥有和购买后使用电子游戏的独特数据，我们探讨了购买前拥有完全信息的潜在福利收益，以及当代预测技术产生这些收益的能力。我们发现了巨大的潜在收益：在目前拥有的游戏中，信息完全的消费者可以用当前支出的40%获得现状游戏时间的90%；而将当前支出重新分配于所有可用游戏，可以使现状游戏时间翻倍。我们开发了一个易于处理的消费者在捆绑商品间进行选择的模型，该模型基于游戏时间相对于总支出，我们使用柯布-道格拉斯校准和捆绑选择的logit模型来实施。完全信息将使消费者剩余增加超过现状支出的价值；并将支出减少一半。听从复杂、个性化预测的消费者将获得这些福利收益的大约40%，同时支出减少五分之一。

33400.title: Have We Got News For You: Theory and Evidence on Firms’ Optimal Expected Capacity Utilization
33400.zh_title: 我们有新闻给你：关于企业最优预期产能利用率的理论与证据
33400.authors: Niklas Amberg, Richard Friberg, Chad Syverson
33400.abstract: Using quarterly micro data on capacity utilization among Swedish manufacturing firms, we show that idiosyncratic factors are more important than aggregate influences in explaining variation in capacity utilization across firms and over time. Idiosyncratic does not mean unpredictable, however. A newsvendor model of optimal capacity predicts that higher demand uncertainty lowers expected capacity utilization, especially for high-markup firms. We find support for these predictions in data containing firm-specific, forward-looking measures of uncertainty: firms facing high uncertainty on average have seven percentage points lower capacity utilization than firms facing low uncertainty; among high-markup firms, the difference is nine percentage points.
33400.zh_abstract: 利用瑞典制造业企业产能利用率的季度微观数据，我们表明，在解释企业间及跨时期产能利用率的变化时，特质性因素比总体性影响更为重要。然而，特质性并不意味着不可预测。一个关于最优产能的报童模型预测，更高的需求不确定性会降低预期产能利用率，尤其是对于高加成率的企业。我们在包含企业特定前瞻性不确定性衡量指标的数据中找到了支持这些预测的证据：面临高不确定性的企业平均产能利用率比面临低不确定性的企业低七个百分点；在高加成率企业中，这一差异为九个百分点。
33400.meta: Programs：EFG, IO, PR；JEL：D20, L11, L23, L60

33439.title: The Role of Physician Altruism in the Physician-Industry Relationship
33439.zh_title: 医生利他主义在医生-行业关系中的作用
33439.authors: Shan Huang, Jing Li, Anirban Basu
33439.abstract: Financial incentives can distort physicians' treatment decisions, fueling healthcare spending. Altruism, a core element of medical professionalism, may counteract these distortions. We link altruism elicited from a revealed preference experiment for 267 U.S. physicians to administrative data on industry transfers and prescribing. Non-altruistic physicians receive substantially higher payments (USD 1,775, or 111% more annually) and increase prescribing of promoted drugs after payment, whereas altruistic physicians do not. Divergence is largest in drug classes with high clinical substitutability. Our findings show that altruism moderates the influence of financial incentives in physician-industry ties, limiting the scope for agency problems in prescribing.
33439.zh_abstract: 经济激励可能会扭曲医生的治疗决策，从而推高医疗支出。利他主义作为医学专业精神的核心要素，可能抵消这些扭曲。我们将从一项针对267名美国医生的显示性偏好实验中得出的利他主义指标，与关于行业转移支付和处方行为的行政数据相关联。非利他主义医生获得的付款显著更高（每年多1775美元，即111%），并且在获得付款后增加了对推广药物的处方量，而利他主义医生则没有。这种差异在临床可替代性高的药物类别中最为显著。我们的研究结果表明，利他主义缓和了经济激励在医生-行业关系中的影响，限制了处方行为中代理问题的范围。

33438.title: Families’ Career Investments and Firms’ Promotion Decisions
33438.zh_title: 家庭的职业投资与企业的晋升决策
33438.authors: Frederik Almar, Benjamin Friedrich, Ana Reynoso, Bastian Schulz, Rune M. Vejlin
33438.abstract: This paper studies how family and firm investments interact to explain gender gaps in career achievement. Using Danish administrative data, we first document novel evidence of this interaction through a “spousal effect” on firm-side career investments. This effect is accounted for by family labor supply choices that shape worker characteristics, which then influence firms’ training and promotion decisions. Our main theoretical contribution is to develop a quantitative life cycle model that captures these family-firm interactions through household formation, families’ joint career and fertility choices, and firms’ managerial training and promotion decisions. We then use the estimated model to show that the interaction between families and firms in the joint equilibrium of labor and marriage markets is important when evaluating firm-side and family-side policy interventions. We find that gender-equal parental leave and a managerial quota can both improve gender equality, but leave implies costly skill depreciation, whereas the quota raises aggregate welfare, in part through adjustments in marital sorting towards families that invest in women.
33438.zh_abstract: 本文研究家庭和企业投资如何相互作用，以解释职业成就中的性别差距。利用丹麦的行政数据，我们首先通过企业端职业投资中的“配偶效应”记录了这种相互作用的新证据。这种效应是由家庭劳动力供给选择所解释的，这些选择塑造了工人的特征，进而影响企业的培训和晋升决策。我们的主要理论贡献是开发了一个定量生命周期模型，该模型通过家庭形成、家庭的联合职业和生育选择以及企业的管理培训和晋升决策来捕捉这些家庭-企业互动。然后，我们使用估计的模型表明，在评估企业端和家庭端政策干预时，家庭与企业在劳动力和婚姻市场联合均衡中的相互作用非常重要。我们发现，性别平等的育儿假和管理层配额都能改善性别平等，但育儿假意味着代价高昂的技能贬值，而配额则提高了总体福利，部分原因是通过调整婚姻匹配，使其转向投资于女性的家庭。
33438.meta: Programs：CH, LS；JEL：J12, J13, J18, J21, J24, J70

33437.title: Divergent Paths: Differential Impacts of Minimum Wage Increases on Individuals with Disabilities
33437.zh_title: 分化的路径：最低工资增长对残疾人士的差异化影响
33437.authors: Jeffrey Clemens, Melissa D. Gentry, Jonathan Meer
33437.abstract: We analyze the differential effects of minimum wage increases on individuals with disabilities using data from the American Community Survey and leveraging state-level minimum wage variation during the 2010s. We find that large minimum wage increases significantly reduce employment and labor force participation for individuals of all working ages with severe disabilities. These declines are accompanied by a downward shift in the wage distribution and an increase in public assistance receipt. By contrast, we find no employment effects for all but young individuals with either non-severe disabilities or no disabilities. Our findings highlight important heterogeneities in minimum wage impacts, raising concerns about labor market policies’ unintended consequences for populations on the margins of the labor force.
33437.zh_abstract: 我们利用美国社区调查数据，并利用2010年代各州最低工资的差异，分析了最低工资增长对残疾人士的差异化影响。我们发现，最低工资的大幅增长显著降低了所有工作年龄段的严重残疾人士的就业率和劳动力参与率。这些下降伴随着工资分布的下移和公共援助领取的增加。相比之下，我们发现对于除年轻人以外的非严重残疾或无残疾人士，没有就业效应。我们的研究结果突显了最低工资影响中重要的异质性，引发了对劳动力市场政策对处于劳动力市场边缘人群产生意外后果的担忧。

33436.title: Quantitative Regional Economics
33436.abstract: This handbook chapter presents the major advances made in the field of economic geography over the past decade. It starts by documenting a number of motivating empirical facts. It then shows how a quantitative regional model that combines the insights from two seminal models from an earlier generation can explain these facts. It then presents a unified quantitative framework that incorporates this and many other economic geography models. This unified framework is sufficiently tractable to characterize its equilibrium properties while flexible enough to be combined with detailed spatial economic data to estimate the model parameters, conduct counterfactuals, and perform welfare analysis. The chapter concludes by discussing many extensions of the framework, some of which have already been explored and others which have not.
33436.zh_abstract: 本手册章节介绍了过去十年经济地理学领域取得的主要进展。它首先记录了一些具有启发性的经验事实。然后展示了如何通过一个结合了早期一代两个开创性模型见解的定量区域模型来解释这些事实。接着，它提出了一个统一的定量框架，该框架整合了此模型及许多其他经济地理学模型。这个统一框架具有足够的可处理性来描述其均衡性质，同时又足够灵活，可以与详细的空间经济数据相结合，以估计模型参数、进行反事实分析和福利分析。本章最后讨论了该框架的许多扩展，其中一些已被探索，另一些则尚未被探索。

33435.title: Capital Structure & Firm Outcomes: Evidence from Dividend Recapitalizations in Private Equity
33435.zh_title: 资本结构与公司结果：来自私募股权股息资本重组的证据
33435.authors: Abhishek Bhardwaj, Abhinav Gupta, Sabrina T. Howell
33435.abstract: We study the effect of a large increase in firm leverage. We isolate the independent, causal effect of debt using the setting of private equity-sponsored dividend recapitalizations, where companies take on debt to pay investor returns, and opportunistic responsiveness to credit supply permits a causal design. After accounting for positive selection, higher total debt (84% on average) dramatically increases the chance of financial distress (by 2.4 times the targeted firm mean), in line with Altman-Z calibrations. Dividend recapitalizations increase deal returns but reduce fund returns, possibly reflecting moral hazard. They also reduce employee wages and loan prices for pre-existing creditors.
33435.zh_abstract: 我们研究公司杠杆大幅增加的影响。我们利用私募股权支持的股息资本重组的背景来隔离债务的独立因果效应，在这种重组中，公司承担债务以支付投资者回报，而对信贷供应的机会主义反应允许进行因果设计。在考虑了正向选择之后，更高的总债务（平均增加84%）戏剧性地增加了财务困境的可能性（是目标公司均值的2.4倍），这与Altman-Z校准结果一致。股息资本重组提高了交易回报，但降低了基金回报，可能反映了道德风险。它们还降低了员工工资和现有债权人的贷款价格。
33435.meta: Programs：CF, LS, PR；JEL：G23, G32, G33, G35

33434.title: Market Macrostructure: Institutions and Asset Prices
33434.zh_title: 市场宏观结构：机构与资产价格
33434.abstract: Market macrostructure studies the broad organization of financial markets into key players and institutional features, and how this organization affects the level and dynamics of asset prices. We present a simple model to discuss when, why, and how market macrostructure matters for asset prices. We then review work on three specific examples: the rise of passive investing in the stock market, the increased role of central banks in bond markets through asset purchase programs, and the role of levered financial intermediaries in financial markets. We highlight various approaches to tackling macrostructure questions including quasi-natural experiments, equilibrium models, and the use of detailed quantity data on asset positions.
33434.zh_abstract: 市场宏观结构研究金融市场在关键参与者和制度特征方面的广泛组织，以及这种组织如何影响资产价格的水平和动态。我们提出了一个简单模型来讨论市场宏观结构何时、为何以及如何对资产价格产生影响。然后，我们回顾了关于三个具体例子的研究：股票市场中被动投资的兴起，中央银行通过资产购买计划在债券市场中作用的增强，以及杠杆金融中介在金融市场中的作用。我们强调了处理宏观结构问题的各种方法，包括准自然实验、均衡模型以及使用关于资产头寸的详细数量数据。
33434.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, ME；JEL：E0, G0, G1

33433.title: Minimum Wage Laws and Job Search
33433.authors: Vitor C. Melo, Christopher Kaiser, David Neumark, Liya Palagashvili, Michael D. Farren
33433.abstract: Simple theoretical models of job search can imply that a higher minimum wage increases the number of job seekers for affected jobs. Researchers defending or explaining nonnegative estimated employment effects of minimum wages often appeal to these models, and sometimes claim that this is the most plausible prediction. We use novel data on job search in U.S. states to examine the effect of minimum wage increases on the number of job seekers for low-skilled positions. We find little if any evidence that higher minimum wages increase job search for low-skilled jobs, and more evidence that higher minimum wages decrease the number of workers seeking employment in these jobs.
33433.zh_abstract: 简单的求职理论模型可能意味着更高的最低工资会增加受影响职位的求职者数量。为最低工资的非负估计就业效应进行辩护或解释的研究人员经常援引这些模型，有时声称这是最合理的预测。我们利用美国各州关于求职的新数据，来检验最低工资增长对低技能职位求职者数量的影响。我们几乎没有发现任何证据表明更高的最低工资会增加低技能工作的求职人数，反而有更多证据表明更高的最低工资会减少寻求这些职位就业的工人数量。

33432.title: The Potential of Public Employment Reallocation as a Place-Based Policy
33432.zh_title: 公共就业重新分配作为地方政策的潜力
33432.abstract: Increasing within-country disparities have led policymakers to deploy public employment reallocation as a place-based policy tool to support struggling regions. This paper surveys the economics literature on capital relocations, purpose-built capitals, and public agency decentralization programs, synthesizing their effects on population, employment, and GDP. I find that while relocating capital cities can spur employment, GDP, and population growth in receiving regions, they entail highly unpredictable costs (3–12% of GDP) and uncertain environmental outcomes. Decentralization programs yield positive short-run public-to-private employment multipliers (around 0.7) stemming from the non-traded sector, but the long-term effect on the traded sector remains ambiguous. Local initial conditions seem to matter more than ex-post spillovers in determining multiplier size. Although more evidence is needed, sending regions do not seem to be extensively harmed when public jobs leave. Given the large share of government payroll in national expenditures, reallocating public employment may hold considerable potential for regional development in the future.
33432.zh_abstract: 日益增长的国内差异促使政策制定者将公共就业重新分配作为一种地方政策工具，以支持陷入困境的地区。本文调查了关于首都搬迁、规划首都和公共机构权力下放项目的经济学文献，综合了它们对人口、就业和GDP的影响。我发现，虽然搬迁首都城市可以刺激接收地区的就业、GDP和人口增长，但它们伴随着高度不可预测的成本（占GDP的3-12%）和不确定的环境结果。权力下放项目在短期内产生了正向的公共部门到私营部门的就业乘数（约0.7），这源于非贸易部门，但对贸易部门的长期影响仍不明确。在决定乘数大小时，地方的初始条件似乎比事后的溢出效应更重要。尽管需要更多证据，但当公共工作岗位离开时，输出地区似乎并未受到广泛损害。鉴于政府工资支出在国家支出中占很大份额，重新分配公共就业在未来可能具有相当大的区域发展潜力。
33432.meta: Programs：ITI, LS, PE；JEL：H7, J45, R11, R58

33431.title: What Do Managers Do? An Economist's Perspective
33431.zh_title: 管理者做什么？一位经济学家的视角
33431.authors: Alan M. Benson, Kathryn L. Shaw
33431.abstract: Economic activity, when sufficiently ambitious, requires motivating and coordinating individuals to work toward a common goal. These aims are the purview of managers. What, however, do managers actually do? We outline three defining principles of economic research on managers and relate them to the set of skills reported by managers on LinkedIn. We highlight “managers of people” and “managers of projects” as a useful distinction for categorizing theoretical, empirical, and descriptive accounts of managers. In light of our three principles, we review research on how managers can create value— namely, by hiring, retaining, training, monitoring, evaluating, allocating, and supervising. We propose that managers apply these skills in different proportions depending on the production technology in which they are embedded and that research on managers should seek to produce generalizable insights by exploring managers’ contributions in different contexts.
33431.zh_abstract: 经济活动，当其足够雄心勃勃时，需要激励和协调个体朝着共同目标努力。这些目标是管理者的职责。然而，管理者实际上做什么？我们概述了关于管理者的经济学研究的三个定义性原则，并将它们与管理者在领英上报告的技能集联系起来。我们强调“人员管理者”和“项目管理者”是分类关于管理者的理论、实证和描述性叙述的一个有用区分。基于我们的三个原则，我们回顾了关于管理者如何创造价值的研究——即通过招聘、留任、培训、监督、评估、分配和指导。我们提出，管理者根据其所嵌入的生产技术以不同比例应用这些技能，并且关于管理者的研究应通过探索管理者在不同情境下的贡献来寻求产生可推广的见解。

33430.title: Education and Dementia Risk
33430.authors: Silvia H. Barcellos, Leandro Carvalho, Kenneth Langa, Sneha Nimmagadda, Patrick Turley
33430.abstract: There is little causal evidence on factors that can protect individuals against Alzheimer’s Disease and Related Dementias (ADRD) risk. We study the causal effect of education on ADRD, exploiting a regression discontinuity generated by a compulsory schooling reform. ADRD was ascertained based on medical history, hospital records, and death registries, addressing concerns about selective sample attrition. We find that education reduces incidence of ADRD and may delay its onset. Using molecular genetic data, we show that the reform weakened the relationship between genetics and ADRD incidence, implying this genetic risk is not immutable and can be modified by social policy.
33430.zh_abstract: 关于哪些因素可以保护个体免受阿尔茨海默病及相关痴呆症风险的影响，因果证据很少。我们利用一项义务教育改革产生的断点回归，研究了教育对阿尔茨海默病及相关痴呆症的因果效应。阿尔茨海默病及相关痴呆症的确定基于病史、医院记录和死亡登记，以解决关于选择性样本损耗的担忧。我们发现教育降低了阿尔茨海默病及相关痴呆症的发病率，并可能延缓其发病。利用分子遗传学数据，我们表明该改革削弱了遗传学与阿尔茨海默病及相关痴呆症发病率之间的关系，这意味着这种遗传风险并非不可改变，可以通过社会政策进行修改。

33429.title: Health Insurance as Economic Stimulus? Evidence from Long-Term Care Jobs
33429.zh_title: 健康保险作为经济刺激？来自长期护理岗位的证据
33429.authors: Martin B. Hackmann, Jörg Heining, Roman Klimke, Maria Polyakova, Holger Seibert
33429.abstract: We leverage decades of administrative data and quasi-experimental variation in the introduction of universal long-term care (LTC) insurance in Germany in 1995 to examine whether health insurance expansions can stimulate local economies. We find that the LTC insurance rollout led not only to sizeable growth of the target LTC sector, but also to an aggregate fall in unemployment and an increase in the labor force participation. Quantitatively, a 10 percentage point increase in the share of insured LTC patients led to 4 more nursing home workers per 1,000 individuals age 65 and older (12% increase). Wages did not rise in the LTC sector or other sectors of the economy. The quality of newly hired nursing home workers declined, but this had no negative effect on old-age life expectancy. Overall, the insurance expansion brought lower-skilled workers into new jobs rather than reallocating workers away from other productive sectors. Our marginal value of public funds (MVPF) analysis suggests that the reform paid for itself when taking the positive fiscal externalities in the labor market into account. To understand which market primitives underpin our findings and to inform the external validity of our results, we develop and estimate a general model of labor markets with product-market subsidies in the presence of wedges, such as income taxes. Our model simulations show that the aggregate welfare effects of insurance expansions are theoretically ambiguous and depend centrally on the magnitude of frictions in input markets.
33429.zh_abstract: 我们利用数十年的行政数据以及1995年德国引入全民长期护理保险所产生的准实验变异，来检验健康保险扩张是否能刺激地方经济。我们发现，长期护理保险的推出不仅导致了目标长期护理部门的显著增长，还导致了总体失业率的下降和劳动参与率的上升。从数量上看，参保长期护理患者比例每增加10个百分点，每1000名65岁及以上老年人中养老院工作人员增加4人（增长12%）。长期护理部门或经济其他部门的工资并未上涨。新聘养老院工作人员的质量有所下降，但这并未对老年预期寿命产生负面影响。总体而言，保险扩张将低技能工人带入了新的工作岗位，而不是将工人从其他生产性部门重新分配。我们的公共资金边际价值分析表明，如果考虑到劳动力市场的积极财政外部性，这项改革是自付成本的。为了理解支撑我们发现的市场基本要素，并为我们的结果的外部有效性提供信息，我们开发并估计了一个在存在楔子（如所得税）的情况下带有产品市场补贴的劳动力市场一般模型。我们的模型模拟表明，保险扩张的总体福利效应在理论上是模糊的，并且主要取决于投入市场摩擦的大小。
33429.meta: Programs：AG, EH, IO, LS, PE；JEL：D58, H0, H51, I0, I13, I31, I38, J08, J14, J23, J64

33428.title: A Bayesian Assessment of the Origins of COVID-19 using Spatiotemporal and Zoonotic Data
33428.zh_title: 利用时空和人畜共患病数据对COVID-19起源的贝叶斯评估
33428.abstract: This paper uses Bayesian methods in conjunction with spatiotemporal and zoonotic data to evaluate the odds ratio for two hypotheses regarding the origin of the COVID-19 pandemic, namely, an accidental laboratory leak of a chimera virus or the transmission of a natural virus from an infected wildlife mammal. The overall Bayes factor is decomposed into 4 components: (1) the odds that the outbreak would occur in the People’s Republic of China (PRC); (2) the odds that the outbreak would occur in Wuhan, conditional on its location in PRC; (3) the odds of observing the spatiotemporal pattern of confirmed COVID-19 cases with no known link to the specific wholesale market where wildlife mammals were being sold, conditional on the outbreak taking place in Wuhan; and (4) the odds of observing the spatiotemporal pattern of confirmed vendor cases at that market, conditional on the outbreak taking place in Wuhan. These four conditional Bayes factors are estimated as 2.3:1, 20:1, 27:1, and 12:1, respectively, and hence the overall odds ratio is 14,900:1, indicating overwhelming evidence in favor of the hypothesis that the pandemic resulted from an accidental lab leak. This conclusion is robust to alternative specifications of the detailed statistical analysis.
33428.zh_abstract: 本文使用贝叶斯方法，结合时空和人畜共患病数据，评估了关于COVID-19大流行起源的两个假设的比值比，即嵌合病毒意外从实验室泄漏，或受感染野生哺乳动物传播的自然病毒。总体贝叶斯因子被分解为4个组成部分：（1）疫情发生在中华人民共和国的几率；（2）疫情发生在武汉的几率，前提是其位于中国境内；（3）在疫情发生在武汉的条件下，观察到已确诊COVID-19病例（与出售野生哺乳动物的特定批发市场无已知关联）的时空模式的几率；（4）在疫情发生在武汉的条件下，观察到该市场确诊供应商病例的时空模式的几率。这四个条件贝叶斯因子分别估计为2.3:1、20:1、27:1和12:1，因此总体比值比为14,900:1，表明压倒性的证据支持大流行源于意外实验室泄漏的假设。这一结论对于详细统计分析的不同设定是稳健的。

33427.title: The Long-Run Effects of America's Largest Residential Racial Desegregation Program: Gautreaux
33427.zh_title: 美国最大住宅种族隔离消除计划的长期效应：Gautreaux
33427.authors: Eric Chyn, Robert Collinson, Danielle H. Sandler
33427.abstract: This paper studies the effects of the largest residential racial desegregation initiative in U.S. history, the Gautreaux Assisted Housing Program. From the late 1970s to the 1990s, Gautreaux moved thousands of Black families into predominantly white neighborhoods to support racial and economic integration. We link historical program records to administrative data and use plausibly exogenous variation in neighborhood placements to study how desegregating moves impact children in the long-run. Being placed in the predominantly white neighborhoods targeted by the program significantly increases children’s future lifetime earnings and wealth. These moves also increase the likelihood of marriage and particularly raise the probability of being married to a white spouse. Moreover, placements through Gautreaux impact neighborhood choices in adulthood. Those placed in predominantly white neighborhoods during childhood live in more racially diverse areas with higher rates of upward mobility nearly 40 years later.
33427.zh_abstract: 本文研究了美国历史上最大的住宅种族隔离消除计划——Gautreaux辅助住房计划的效果。从20世纪70年代末到90年代，Gautreaux将数千个黑人家庭迁往以白人为主的社区，以支持种族和经济融合。我们将历史计划记录与行政数据相关联，并利用社区安置中看似外生的变异来研究隔离消除性搬迁如何长期影响儿童。被安置在该计划所针对的以白人为主的社区，显著提高了儿童未来的终生收入和财富。这些搬迁也增加了结婚的可能性，特别是提高了与白人配偶结婚的概率。此外，通过Gautreaux进行的安置影响了成年后的社区选择。那些在童年时期被安置在以白人为主的社区的人，在近40年后生活在种族更加多样化的地区，且向上流动性更高。
33427.meta: Programs：CH, LS, PE；JEL：H00, I30, J01, R38

33426.title: Trade Policy, Exchange Rates, and the Globalization Surge of the 1990s
33426.zh_title: 贸易政策、汇率与1990年代的全球化浪潮
33426.abstract: The decision by developing countries to open up their economies to foreign trade and investment in the 1980s and 1990s was a momentous event in world history. How and why did this trade policy revolution take place? Most accounts of trade politics stress domestic interest groups or trade agreements as driving policy changes, but these explanations fail in this period. This paper notes that many import restrictions were imposed for balance of payments purposes, as a way of avoiding a devaluation and protecting foreign exchange reserves from depletion under fixed exchange rates. A shortage of foreign exchange in the mid-1980s led countries, under the guidance of economists, to adopt more flexible exchange rate arrangements that boosted export earnings and made import controls unnecessary for payments balance. Like during the Great Depression, the exchange rate regime was a key factor behind a country’s trade policy.
33426.zh_abstract: 发展中国家在20世纪80年代和90年代决定向外国贸易和投资开放经济，是世界历史上的一个重大事件。这场贸易政策革命是如何以及为何发生的？大多数关于贸易政治的论述强调国内利益集团或贸易协定是推动政策变化的因素，但这些解释在这一时期并不成立。本文指出，许多进口限制是为了国际收支目的而实施的，作为在固定汇率下避免货币贬值和保护外汇储备免于枯竭的一种方式。20世纪80年代中期外汇短缺，导致各国在经济学家指导下采用更灵活的汇率安排，这增加了出口收入，并使进口管制对于国际收支平衡变得不再必要。与大萧条时期一样，汇率制度是一个国家贸易政策的关键因素。

33425.title: Dynamic Scoring: A Progress Report on Why, When, and How
33425.zh_title: 动态评分：关于为何、何时以及如何进行的进展报告
33425.authors: Douglas W. Elmendorf, R. Glenn Hubbard, Heidi L. Williams
33425.abstract: By design, official budget estimates for legislative proposals generally exclude the proposals’ likely effects on labor, capital, productivity, and output, as well as any feedback from such effects to the federal budget. Policymakers would benefit from knowing the expected sizes of those effects, and advances in research and in the estimating agencies’ tools and experience have made such analysis more feasible. If Congress requested that those effects be included more often in official budget estimates—so-called dynamic scoring of legislation—the advantages and disadvantages would vary across policy areas. For some areas, the estimated budgetary impact of the currently excluded effects would be significantly different from the impact of the included effects. But dynamic scoring would be substantially more time-consuming than conventional scoring, and in some areas, the research base is insufficient for credible estimation.
33425.zh_abstract: 按照设计，立法提案的官方预算估算通常排除这些提案可能对劳动力、资本、生产率和产出产生的影响，以及这些影响对联邦预算的任何反馈。政策制定者将受益于了解这些影响的预期规模，而研究以及估算机构的工具和经验的进步使得此类分析更加可行。如果国会要求将这些影响更频繁地纳入官方预算估算——即所谓的立法动态评分——其优缺点将因政策领域而异。对于某些领域，目前被排除的影响的预算影响估计值将与已包含的影响的估计值显著不同。但动态评分将比传统评分耗费更多时间，并且在某些领域，研究基础不足以进行可信的估算。

33424.title: Places versus People: The Ins and Outs of Labor Market Adjustment to Globalization
33424.zh_title: 地方与人民：劳动力市场对全球化调整的进出机制
33424.authors: David Autor, David Dorn, Gordon H. Hanson, Maggie R. Jones, Bradley Setzler
33424.abstract: This chapter analyzes the distinct adjustment paths of U.S. labor markets (places) and U.S. workers (people) to increased Chinese import competition during the 2000s. Using comprehensive register data for 2000-2019, we document that employment levels more than fully rebound in trade-exposed places after 2010, while employment-topopulation ratios remain depressed and manufacturing employment further atrophies. The adjustment of places to trade shocks is generational: affected areas recover primarily by adding workers to non-manufacturing who were below working age when the shock occurred. Entrants are disproportionately native-born Hispanics, foreignborn immigrants, women, and the college-educated, who find employment in relatively low-wage service industries in healthcare, education, retail, and hospitality. Using the panel structure of the employer-employee data, we decompose changes in the employment composition of places into trade-induced shifts in the gross flows of people across sectors, locations, and non-employment status. Contrary to standard models, trade shocks reduce geographic mobility, with both in- and out-migration remaining depressed through 2019. The employment recovery stems almost entirely from young adults and foreign-born immigrants taking their first U.S. jobs in affected areas, with minimal contributions from cross-sector transitions of former manufacturing workers. Although worker inflows into non-manufacturing more than fully offset manufacturing employment losses in trade-exposed locations after 2010, incumbent workers neither fully recover earnings losses nor predominantly exit the labor market, but rather age in place as communities undergo rapid demographic and industrial transitions.
33424.zh_abstract: 本章分析了2000年代美国劳动力市场（地方）和美国工人（人民）对日益加剧的中国进口竞争的不同调整路径。利用2000-2019年的全面登记数据，我们记录了2010年后受贸易影响地区的就业水平不仅完全恢复，而且超过原有水平，而就业人口比率仍然低迷，制造业就业进一步萎缩。地方对贸易冲击的调整是代际性的：受影响地区主要通过增加在冲击发生时未达到工作年龄的非制造业工人来实现复苏。新进入者中，本土出生的西班牙裔、外国出生的移民、女性和大学毕业生比例过高，他们在医疗保健、教育、零售和酒店等相对低工资的服务行业找到工作。利用雇主-雇员数据的面板结构，我们将地方就业构成的变化分解为贸易引发的跨部门、跨地点和非就业状态的工人总流动变化。与标准模型相反，贸易冲击降低了地理流动性，流入和流出移民在2019年之前都持续低迷。就业复苏几乎完全来自在受影响地区开始其第一份美国工作的年轻成年人和外国出生的移民，来自前制造业工人的跨部门转换贡献极小。尽管2010年后，非制造业的工人流入在受贸易影响的地点完全抵消了制造业就业损失，但现有工人既未能完全恢复收入损失，也并未主要退出劳动力市场，而是在社区经历快速人口和产业转型的过程中原地老化。
33424.meta: Programs：EFG, ITI, LS；JEL：F16, J23, J31, J62, L6, R12

33423.title: Monetary Policy Predicts Currency Movements
33423.zh_title: 货币政策预测货币走势
33423.authors: Söhnke M. Bartram, Mark Grinblatt, Yan Xu
33423.abstract: The relative restrictiveness of a central bank’s supply of money predicts the raw and risk-adjusted returns of its currency—both next month and at least three years into the future. Archived data, known by currency traders at the time, estimates central bank restrictiveness as a scaling of the residual from out-of-sample panel regressions of M1 on macroeconomic variables tied to domestic and international transaction requirements. Carry’s ability to forecast currency returns is subsumed by the central bank restrictiveness signal, which also forecasts inflation.
33423.zh_abstract: 央行货币供给的相对紧缩性可以预测其货币的原始回报和风险调整后回报——无论是下个月还是至少未来三年。当时外汇交易员已知的存档数据，通过将M1与国内和国际交易需求相关的宏观经济变量进行样本外面板回归，将残差进行缩放来估计央行的紧缩程度。利差交易预测货币回报的能力被央行紧缩信号所包含，该信号也能预测通胀。

33422.title: Sources and Extent of Rising Partisan Segregation in the U.S. – Evidence from 143 Million Voters
33422.zh_title: 美国党派隔离加剧的来源与程度——来自1.43亿选民的数据
33422.authors: Jacob R. Brown, Enrico Cantoni, Ryan Enos, Vincent Pons, Emilie Sartre
33422.abstract: How has the segregation of Democrats and Republicans changed over time and why? Using two datasets tracking the location and party affiliation of every voter between 2008 and 2020 in states with partisan registration, we find that geographic partisan segregation has increased year-over-year at all levels, from Congressional Districts to Census Blocks. Democratic-trending areas have a starkly different demographic profile than Republican-trending areas, so the confluence of demographics, partisanship, and geography is growing. We decompose the increase in partisan segregation into different sources and show that it has not been driven by residential mobility but rather by generational turnover, as new voters cause some places to become more homogeneously Democratic, and by party switching, as voters leaving the Democratic party cause other places to become more Republican. Young people, women, and non-white voters contribute most to changes in Democratic-trending areas; and white and older voters most contribute in Republican-trending areas.
33422.zh_abstract: 民主党人和共和党人的隔离程度如何随时间变化以及为什么变化？利用两个数据集，追踪2008年至2020年间有党派登记的州中每位选民的位置和党派归属，我们发现，从国会选区到人口普查街区，各级地理上的党派隔离逐年加剧。民主党倾向地区的人口结构特征与共和党倾向地区截然不同，因此人口结构、党派倾向和地理位置的融合正在加剧。我们将党派隔离的增加分解为不同来源，并表明这种增加并非由居住流动性驱动，而是由代际更替（新选民导致某些地方变得更同质化地支持民主党）和党派转换（离开民主党的选民导致其他地方变得更支持共和党）驱动。年轻人、女性和非白人选民对民主党倾向地区的变化贡献最大；白人和年长选民对共和党倾向地区的变化贡献最大。

33421.title: Can Machines Learn Weak Signals?
33421.abstract: In high-dimensional regressions with low signal-to-noise ratios, we assess the predictive performance of several prevalent machine learning methods. Theoretical insights show Ridge regression's superiority in exploiting weak signals, surpassing a zero benchmark. In contrast, Lasso fails to exceed this baseline, indicating its learning limitations. Simulations reveal that Random Forest generally outperforms Gradient Boosted Regression Trees when signals are weak. Moreover, Neural Networks with l2-regularization excel in capturing nonlinear functions of weak signals. Our empirical analysis across six economic datasets suggests that the weakness of signals, not necessarily the absence of sparsity, may be Lasso's major limitation in economic predictions.
33421.zh_abstract: 在信噪比低的高维回归中，我们评估了几种主流机器学习方法的预测性能。理论见解表明，岭回归在利用弱信号方面具有优越性，超过了零基准。相比之下，Lasso未能超过该基准，表明其学习能力有限。模拟显示，当信号较弱时，随机森林通常优于梯度提升回归树。此外，带有l2正则化的神经网络在捕捉弱信号的非线性函数方面表现出色。我们对六个经济数据集的实证分析表明，信号的微弱（而非必然缺乏稀疏性）可能是Lasso在经济预测中的主要局限性。

33420.title: Dismantling the License Raj: The Long Road to India’s 1991 Trade Reforms
33420.zh_title: 拆除许可证制度：印度1991年贸易改革的漫漫长路
33420.abstract: In July 1991, India began to dismantle its long-standing, highly restrictive import control regime and move toward a more open economy. How were policymakers able to dislodge and replace an entrenched system with powerful vested interests behind it? Standard reasons for policy change—pressure from domestic producer interests, shifts in political power, or conditionality by international financial institutions—fail to explain why the shift in trade policy took place. Instead, reform-minded technocrats persuaded political leaders to reject what had been a standard response to balance of payments pressure (import repression to avoid a devaluation) and embrace a new approach (exchange rate adjustment and a reduction of import restrictions). This paper explores the economic and political context behind the country’s dramatic policy transformation. India’s experience highlights the crucial link between exchange rate policy and trade policy.
33420.zh_abstract: 1991年7月，印度开始拆除其长期存在且高度限制性的进口管制体制，转向更开放的经济。政策制定者是如何能够取代一个根深蒂固且背后有强大既得利益集团的体系的？政策变革的标准原因——国内生产者利益压力、政治权力转移或国际金融机构的附加条件——无法解释贸易政策转变为何发生。相反，具有改革意识的技术官僚说服政治领导人，摒弃了应对国际收支压力的标准做法（通过进口管制避免货币贬值），并接受了一种新方法（汇率调整和减少进口限制）。本文探讨了该国戏剧性政策转型背后的经济和政治背景。印度的经验凸显了汇率政策与贸易政策之间的关键联系。

33419.title: Wealth Tax Enforcement in Sweden: Filing Requirements and Pre-Populated Returns
33419.zh_title: 瑞典的财富税执行：申报要求与预填申报表
33419.abstract: This paper shows that two features of wealth tax administration in Sweden—(1) filing requirements and (2) pre-populated returns—have a large impact on compliance even in an environment with highly-developed third-party reporting through information returns. Up to 1993, all taxpayers had to fill in wealth information when filing the (joint) income and wealth tax return. In 1994-1996, only those with net wealth above the exemption threshold (approximately the top 10%) needed to fill in wealth information. This leads to a very large reduction of about half of the number of taxpayers slightly above the wealth tax exemption threshold, and a reduction of about 20% in the total number of wealth taxpayers above the threshold. Starting in 1997, Sweden began pre-populating wealth information on tax returns for taxpayers with third-party-reported net wealth above the exemption threshold. Symmetrically, this immediately doubles the number of taxpayers slightly above the threshold and increases the number of all wealth taxpayers by almost 20%. The introduction of information returns for financial wealth in 1986 had a comparatively small impact on wealth reporting.
33419.zh_abstract: 本文表明，瑞典财富税管理的两个特征——（1）申报要求和（2）预填申报表——即使在通过信息申报表进行高度发达的第三方报告的环境中，也对合规性产生了巨大影响。直到1993年，所有纳税人在提交（联合）所得税和财富税申报表时都必须填写财富信息。在1994-1996年，只有净资产超过免税门槛（大约前10%）的纳税人才需要填写财富信息。这导致略高于财富税免税门槛的纳税人数量大幅减少约一半，并且高于门槛的财富纳税人总数减少了约20%。从1997年开始，瑞典开始为那些第三方报告的净资产高于免税门槛的纳税人预填财富税申报表中的财富信息。对称地，这立即将略高于门槛的纳税人数量翻了一番，并将所有财富纳税人的数量增加了近20%。相比之下，1986年引入金融财富信息申报表对财富报告的影响相对较小。

33418.title: Do Place-Based Industrial Interventions Help "Left-Behind" Workers? Lessons from WWII and Beyond
33418.zh_title: 基于地点的产业干预能帮助“被遗忘”的工人吗？二战及之后的教训
33418.abstract: Place-based industrial interventions—policies that promote production and investment in specific regions—are often proposed with the intent of improving economic conditions for residents, particularly "left-behind" workers in distressed local labor markets. This chapter discusses the theoretical rationale for the use of industrial interventions to achieve distributional goals and evidence about their effectiveness to that end. I use government-funded plant construction during World War II (WWII) in the United States as a focal case study, which I then compare and contrast to other industrial interventions studied in the literature. While government plant construction during WWII drove an expansion of high-wage semi-skilled jobs open to local residents, which in turn fueled an increase in upward mobility among local residents, the evidence from more recent interventions suggests that modern plant sitings often fail to yield similar benefits to local workers. The implementation details of industrial interventions matter crucially for their incidence on local workers. Interventions that generate opportunities for up-skilling and occupational advancement accessible to target populations appear to be most likely to generate meaningful distributional benefits. I argue that while core production goals during WWII happened to inherently align with the promotion of upward mobility, such alignment is not guaranteed in general and may be the exception rather than the rule in modern contexts.
33418.zh_abstract: 基于地点的产业干预——促进特定地区生产和投资的政策——通常旨在改善居民的经济状况，特别是处于困境地方劳动力市场中的“被遗忘”工人。本章讨论了利用产业干预实现分配目标的理论依据，以及关于其有效性的证据。我以二战期间美国政府资助的工厂建设作为重点案例研究，然后将其与文献中研究的其他产业干预措施进行比较和对比。虽然二战期间的政府工厂建设推动了面向当地居民的高薪半熟练工作岗位的扩张，进而促进了当地居民向上流动性的提升，但来自近期干预措施的证据表明，现代的工厂选址往往未能为当地工人带来类似的益处。产业干预的实施细节对其对当地工人的影响至关重要。能够为目标人群创造技能提升和职业发展机会的干预措施，最有可能产生有意义的分配效益。我认为，虽然二战期间的核心生产目标恰好与促进向上流动性内在一致，但这种一致性在一般情况下并不能得到保证，并且在现代背景下可能是例外而非规则。
33418.meta: Programs：DAE, DEV, LS, PE；JEL：H54, J31, J62, N61, O25, R11, R53

33417.title: Ancient Epics in the Television Age: Religious Identity and the Rise of Hindu Nationalism in India
33417.zh_title: 电视时代的古代史诗：宗教认同与印度教民族主义在印度的兴起
33417.authors: Dean Yang, Alessandro Saia, Akhila Kovvuri, Resuf Ahmed, Paul Brimble
33417.abstract: How does strengthened religious identity affect society and politics? We study the impact of “Ramayan,” the massively popular televised version of the Hindu epic. We conduct difference-in-difference analyses, measuring Ramayan exposure with TV signal strength in Indian localities at the time of airing in 1987. Localities with higher Ramayan exposure saw persistently strengthened Hindu religious identity, measured by newborn names and dietary practices; short-run increases in Hindu-Muslim communal violence; and longer-run increases in electoral success for the Hindu nationalist Bharatiya Janata Party. Increased presence of Hindu religious schools is a likely mechanism behind long-run persistence of effects.
33417.zh_abstract: 强化的宗教认同如何影响社会和政治？我们研究了“罗摩衍那”的影响，这是一部广受欢迎的印度史诗电视剧。我们采用双重差分分析，利用1987年播出时印度各地的电视信号强度来衡量对“罗摩衍那”的接触程度。接触“罗摩衍那”程度较高的地区，其印度教宗教认同（以新生儿姓名和饮食习惯衡量）持续增强；印度教-穆斯林社区暴力事件在短期内增加；以及印度教民族主义政党印度人民党在长期内选举成功率上升。印度教宗教学校的存在增加是效应长期持续的一个可能机制。

33416.title: The Long and Short of Financial Development
33416.zh_title: 金融发展的长期与短期
33416.authors: Douglas W. Diamond, Yunzhi Hu, Raghuram Rajan
33416.abstract: By improving the pledgeability of returns to financiers, financial development enhances a producer’s ability to raise capital to fund long term complex investments. Consequently, it should increase output and welfare. However, a general equilibrium analysis suggests this is not always so. We consider an economy where producers and consuming/financing households are distinct agents, where producers lack sufficient capital, and where households care about both pledgeable returns and liquidity. In this economy, the greater pledgeability of long-term project earnings can reduce long term production and overall welfare, even though it makes financing more accessible. Our results have implications for why economies face impediments to financial development and overall growth, especially when producer capital is scarce.
33416.zh_abstract: 通过提高对金融家回报的可质押性，金融发展增强了生产者筹集资本以资助长期复杂投资的能力。因此，它应该增加产出和福利。然而，一般均衡分析表明情况并非总是如此。我们考虑一个经济，其中生产者和消费/融资家庭是不同的主体，生产者缺乏足够的资本，而家庭既关心可质押回报也关心流动性。在这个经济中，长期项目收益更高的可质押性会减少长期生产和整体福利，尽管它使融资更容易获得。我们的结果对于解释为什么经济体在金融发展和整体增长方面面临障碍具有启示意义，尤其是在生产者资本稀缺的情况下。
33416.meta: Programs：CF, EFG, IFM, POL；JEL：G1, G3, O10, O16, O4, O43

33415.title: Declining Youth Well-being in 167 UN Countries. Does Survey Mode, or Question Matter?
33415.zh_title: 167个联合国成员国青年福祉的下降：调查模式或问题是否重要？
33415.abstract: I find evidence from 167/193 UN member countries that the young have lower levels of well-being than older age groups, using self-reported data collected on the internet from the Global Minds internet-based surveys of 2020-2024 using their MHQ measure. We found that the evidence on the mental health of the young was different when self-reported, internet-based responses were used compared with those obtained via an interviewer, either face-to-face or via the telephone. Our analysis of the United States using 14 surveys taken using all three methods always found the young had the lowest well-being of any age group. The evidence for relatively low youth well-being on we collected using four major European surveys was stronger in internet-based surveys and when negative affect variables rather than life satisfaction and happiness were used. The young were significantly more lonely and more unhappy than all other age group, in 26/27 EU member countries in the internet-based EU Loneliness Survey of 2022. We also examined the Global Flourishing survey of 2022-2024 across 22 countries that used both telephone and web-based surveys and the results showed rising well-being in age, in the internet surveys and declining well-being in age in the telephone surveys. Mode of survey and question used matters. The young are experiencing a mental health crisis globally picked up especially in self-reports. This is new.
33415.zh_abstract: 我利用2020-2024年全球思维互联网调查（Global Minds internet-based surveys）中通过MHQ测量指标收集的自我报告数据，从193个联合国成员国中的167个国家发现证据表明，年轻人的福祉水平低于老年群体。我们发现，当使用自我报告的互联网回复与通过面对面或电话访谈员获得的数据相比时，关于年轻人心理健康的证据有所不同。我们使用所有三种方法进行的14项调查对美国进行的分析始终发现，年轻人是所有年龄组中福祉最低的。我们在四项主要欧洲调查中收集到的关于青年福祉相对较低的证据，在基于互联网的调查中以及在使用负面情感变量而非生活满意度和幸福感时更为强烈。在2022年基于互联网的欧盟孤独感调查中，27个欧盟成员国中有26个国家的年轻人比所有其他年龄组显著更孤独、更不快乐。我们还考察了2022-2024年覆盖22个国家的全球繁荣调查（Global Flourishing survey），该调查同时使用了电话和网络调查，结果显示，在互联网调查中福祉随年龄增长而上升，而在电话调查中福祉随年龄增长而下降。调查模式和所用问题很重要。年轻人正在经历一场全球性的心理健康危机，这一点尤其在自我报告中显现出来。这是新的发现。

33414.title: The Targeting of Place-Based Policies: The New Markets Tax Credit Versus Opportunity Zones
33414.zh_title: 基于地点的政策的靶向性：新市场税收抵免与机会区
33414.authors: Kevin Corinth, David Coyne, Naomi E. Feldman, Craig Johnson
33414.abstract: For a place-based policy to succeed, it must target the right areas—typically those with lower economic development and resident well-being. The U.S. has two major place-based tax policies: the New Markets Tax Credit (NMTC), where government approved entities select investments, and Opportunity Zones (OZs), where private investors choose projects. Despite underlying design differences, both target census tracts with relatively high poverty rates, low median income and weak labor markets. However, OZs tend to attract more investment in areas with higher pre-existing private investment, often located in prosperous counties and high-growth regions. Census tracts lacking investment from either program generally have less private investment, lower home value growth, and lower population growth, suggesting that additional policies may be needed to reach areas less primed for investment.
33414.zh_abstract: 要使基于地点的政策取得成功，它必须瞄准正确的区域——通常是那些经济发展和居民福祉较低的区域。美国有两项主要的基于地点的税收政策：新市场税收抵免（NMTC），由政府批准的实体选择投资；以及机会区（OZs），由私人投资者选择项目。尽管底层设计存在差异，两者都瞄准了贫困率相对较高、收入中位数较低且劳动力市场疲软的人口普查区。然而，机会区往往在已有较高私人投资的地区吸引更多投资，这些地区通常位于繁荣的县和高增长区域。缺乏任一计划投资的人口普查区通常私人投资较少、房屋价值增长较低且人口增长较低，这表明可能需要额外的政策来覆盖那些投资条件较差的区域。

33413.title: Climate Transition Risks and the Energy Sector
33413.zh_title: 气候转型风险与能源部门
33413.authors: Viral V. Acharya, Stefano Giglio, Stefano Pastore, Johannes Stroebel, Zhenhao Tan, Tiffany Yong
33413.abstract: We build a general equilibrium model to study how climate transition risks affect energy prices and the valuations of different firms in the energy sector. We consider two types of fossil fuel firms: incumbents that have developed oil reserves they can extract today or tomorrow, and new entrants that must invest in exploration and drilling today to have reserves to potentially extract tomorrow. There are also renewable energy firms that produce emission-free energy but cannot currently serve non-electrifiable sectors of the economy. We analyze three sources of climate transition risk: (i) changes in the probability of a technological breakthrough that allows renewable energy firms to serve all economic sectors; (ii) changes in expected future taxes on carbon emissions; and (iii) restrictions on today's development of additional fossil fuel production capacity. We show that different transition risks—and, importantly, uncertainty about their realizations—have distinct effects on firms' decisions, on their valuations, and on equilibrium energy prices. We provide empirical support for the heterogeneous effects of different transition risks on energy prices and stock returns of firms in different energy sub-sectors.
33413.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个一般均衡模型，研究气候转型风险如何影响能源价格以及能源部门不同企业的估值。我们考虑两类化石燃料企业：拥有已开发石油储量、可在今天或明天开采的在位企业，以及必须投资于今天的勘探和钻探以拥有可能在明天开采的储量的新进入者。还有可再生能源企业，它们生产无排放能源，但目前无法服务于经济中不可电气化的部门。我们分析了气候转型风险的三个来源：(i) 允许可再生能源企业服务于所有经济部门的技术突破概率的变化；(ii) 预期未来碳排放税的变化；以及 (iii) 对今天开发额外化石燃料生产能力的限制。我们表明，不同的转型风险——以及重要的是，关于其实现的不确定性——对企业决策、企业估值和均衡能源价格具有不同的影响。我们为不同转型风险对能源价格和不同能源子行业企业股票收益的异质性影响提供了实证支持。
33413.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EEE, EFG, PE, PR；JEL：G0, Q0

33412.title: Geographic Resolution in Environmental Policy: EPA’s Shift from Regions to Counties Under the Clean Air Act
33412.zh_title: 环境政策中的地理分辨率：清洁空气法案下EPA从区域到县的转变
33412.authors: Maureen L. Cropper, Mengjia Hu, Yongjoon Park, Nicholas Z. Muller
33412.abstract: Prior to 1978 EPA regulated nonattainment with the Clean Air Act using Air Quality Control Regions (AQCRs), switching to counties in 1978. This paper investigates the implications of this change for ambient pollution and manufacturing employment. We find that EPA’s official AQCR nonattainment designation for total suspended particulate matter (TSP) in 1972 had no causal effect on ambient TSP. Nor do we detect robust causal evidence that being in nonattainment in the AQCR regime affected employment in pollution intensive manufacturing industries. In contrast, using an imputed definition of 1972 nonattainment based on county level monitor readings, we find evidence that nonattainment decreased ambient TSP and manufacturing employment. After 1978, when EPA officially adopted county level nonattainment designations, both ambient TSP and manufacturing employment in pollution intensive industries declined. We discuss the implications of these findings for EPA’s decision regarding the geographic level at which to regulate air pollution.
33412.zh_abstract: 在1978年之前，EPA使用空气质量控制区域（AQCRs）来监管《清洁空气法案》的不达标情况，并于1978年转为使用县。本文研究了这一变化对周围环境污染和制造业就业的影响。我们发现，EPA在1972年对总悬浮颗粒物（TSP）的官方AQCR不达标认定对周围环境TSP没有因果效应。我们也没有检测到稳健的因果证据表明，在AQCR制度下处于不达标状态影响了污染密集型制造业的就业。相比之下，使用基于县级监测仪读数的1972年不达标推算定义，我们发现不达标降低了周围环境TSP和制造业就业的证据。1978年之后，当EPA正式采用县级不达标认定时，周围环境TSP和污染密集型行业的制造业就业均有所下降。我们讨论了这些发现对EPA关于监管空气污染的地理层级决策的启示。

33411.title: Moral Hazard and the Sustainability of Income-Driven Repayment Plans
33411.zh_title: 道德风险与收入驱动型还款计划的可持续性
33411.authors: Chao Fu, Xiaomeng Li, Basit Zafar
33411.abstract: Income-Driven Repayment (IDR) plans tie student loan repayment to income and forgive unpaid debt after a certain number of years of repayment. We investigate how these features affect one’s career choices through a survey where the same student is asked to select job profiles under various repayment plans. Consistent with our Ben- Porath style model, the survey results reveal that IDR is a double-edged sword. On the one hand, 36% of students underinvest in their human capital under the standard repayment plan relative to their would-be choices in a debt-free scenario; an IDR resembling the Saving on a Valuable Education (SAVE) plan reduces this fraction to 20%. On the other hand, IDRs induce moral hazard: under a SAVE-like plan, 22% of students choose job profiles with lower initial wages and higher wage growth than their choices in a debt-free scenario, leaving part of their debt forgiven. A back-of-the-envelope calculation indicates that this type of moral hazard alone would render SAVE-like plans unviable were they carried out by private lenders; however, government-run IDRs are sustainable due to the government’s ability to collect lifetime income taxes.
33411.zh_abstract: 收入驱动型还款（IDR）计划将学生贷款还款与收入挂钩，并在还款一定年限后免除未偿还债务。我们通过一项调查来研究这些特征如何影响个人的职业选择，在该调查中，同一名学生被要求在各种还款计划下选择工作档案。与我们基于Ben-Porath风格的模型一致，调查结果显示IDR是一把双刃剑。一方面，在标准还款计划下，36%的学生相对于他们在无债务情景下的选择，对其人力资本投资不足；一个类似于“节省宝贵教育”（SAVE）计划的IDR将此比例降至20%。另一方面，IDR会诱发道德风险：在类似SAVE的计划下，22%的学生选择了初始工资较低但工资增长较快的工作档案，而非他们在无债务情景下的选择，从而使其部分债务被免除。一项粗略计算表明，仅此类道德风险就足以使类似SAVE的计划在由私人贷款机构执行时不可行；然而，政府运营的IDR是可持续的，因为政府有能力征收终身所得税。
33411.meta: Programs：ED, LS, PE, TWP；JEL：H0, I20, I22, I23, J01, J24

33410.title: Sources of Market Power in Web Search: Evidence from a Field Experiment
33410.zh_title: 网络搜索中市场力量的来源：来自实地实验的证据
33410.authors: Hunt Allcott, Juan Camilo Castillo, Matthew Gentzkow, Leon Musolff, Tobias Salz
33410.abstract: We study the forces behind Google’s large web-search market share. We develop a demand model with switching costs, quality beliefs, and inattention, and estimate it using a field experiment. We find that (i) requiring active choice barely increases Bing’s market share; (ii) Google users paid to try Bing update positively about its quality and many prefer to continue using it; (iii) many Google users defaulted into Bing do not switch back, consistent with inattention. Counterfactuals suggest that eliminating demand frictions doubles Bing’s market share. Successful remedies expose users to alternative search engines, while data sharing mandates have small effects.
33410.zh_abstract: 我们研究了谷歌在网络搜索中占据巨大市场份额背后的力量。我们构建了一个包含转换成本、质量信念和注意力不足的需求模型，并通过一项实地实验对其进行估计。我们发现：(i) 要求主动选择几乎不会增加必应的市场份额；(ii) 付费试用必应的谷歌用户会正向更新对其质量的看法，并且许多人更愿意继续使用它；(iii) 许多默认使用必应的谷歌用户不会切换回谷歌，这与注意力不足一致。反事实分析表明，消除需求摩擦会使必应的市场份额翻倍。成功的补救措施让用户接触到替代搜索引擎，而数据共享授权的影响很小。

33409.title: Environmental Migration and Race during the Great American Drought, 1935-1940
33409.zh_title: 大干旱期间的环境移民与种族差异，1935-1940
33409.authors: Christopher Sichko, Ariell Zimran, Aparna Howlader
33409.abstract: We study racial differences in internal migration responses to one of the most severe climatic shocks in US history—the drought of the 1930s. Using data from the 1940 census on 65 million adults, we find that individuals exposed to more severe drought between 1935 and 1940 were more likely to make an inter-county move and that this responsiveness was greater for black individuals than white individuals. This racial difference was particularly pronounced among the rural population. Black individuals' migration premium came despite their systematic disadvantage in the economy of the 1930s and evidence along dimensions other than race that disadvantage limited individuals' ability to adapt to the drought through migration. Federal relief spending under the Agricultural Adjustment Act (AAA) magnified this racial difference, reducing the migration response to drought for white individuals and increasing it for black individuals. These results help to better understand how the reaction of different groups aggregate to determine the magnitude and composition of migration responses to natural disasters, as well as the roles of migration and government policy in disadvantaged groups' responses to natural disasters.
33409.zh_abstract: 我们研究了美国历史上最严重的气候冲击之一——1930年代的干旱——对国内移民反应的种族差异。利用1940年人口普查中6500万成年人的数据，我们发现，在1935年至1940年间暴露于更严重干旱的个体更有可能进行跨县迁移，并且这种反应在黑人群体中比在白人群体中更为强烈。这种种族差异在农村人口中尤为显著。尽管黑人群体的迁移溢价是在1930年代经济中系统性处于劣势的背景下出现的，并且有证据表明，在种族以外的维度上，劣势限制了个体通过迁移适应干旱的能力，但这一现象仍然存在。根据《农业调整法》（AAA）提供的联邦救济支出放大了这种种族差异，减少了白人群体的干旱迁移反应，同时增加了黑人群体的迁移反应。这些结果有助于更好地理解不同群体的反应如何汇聚起来，决定对自然灾害迁移反应的规模和构成，以及迁移和政府政策在弱势群体应对自然灾害中的作用。
33409.meta: Programs：DAE, DEV, EEE, LS；JEL：D63, J15, N32, N52, O13, O15, Q12, R11, R23

33408.title: Housing Subsidies for Refugees: Experimental Evidence on Life Outcomes and Social Integration in Jordan
33408.zh_title: 难民住房补贴：关于约旦生活结果与社会融合的实验证据
33408.authors: Abdulrazzak Tamim, Emma C. Smith, Bailey Palmer, Edward Miguel, Samuel Leone, Sandra V. Rozo, Sarah Stillman
33408.abstract: Refugees require assistance for basic needs like housing but local host communities may feel excluded from that assistance, potentially affecting community relations. This study experimentally evaluates the effect of a housing assistance program for Syrian refugees in Jordan on both the recipients and their neighbors. The program offered full rental subsidies and landlord incentives for housing improvements, but saw only moderate uptake, in part due to landlord reluctance. The program improved short-run housing quality and lowered housing expenditures, but did not yield sustained economic benefits, partly due to redistribution of aid. The program unexpectedly led to a deterioration in child socio-emotional well-being, and also strained relations between Jordanian neighbors and refugees. In all, housing subsidies had limited measurable benefits for refugee well-being while worsening social cohesion, highlighting the possible need for alternative forms of aid.
33408.zh_abstract: 难民需要住房等基本需求的援助，但当地东道社区可能会感到被排除在这种援助之外，这可能会影响社区关系。本研究通过实验评估了约旦境内叙利亚难民住房援助计划对受助者及其邻居的影响。该计划提供全额租金补贴和房东改善住房的激励措施，但由于房东的抵触等原因，参与率仅为中等水平。该计划改善了短期住房质量并降低了住房支出，但并未带来持续的经济效益，部分原因是援助的再分配。该计划意外地导致儿童社会情感福祉恶化，并加剧了约旦邻居与难民之间的紧张关系。总体而言，住房补贴对难民福祉的有限可衡量收益是以社会凝聚力恶化为代价的，这凸显了可能需要替代形式的援助。

33407.title: The Evolution of Unobserved Skill Returns in the U.S.: A New Approach Using Panel Data
33407.zh_title: 美国不可观测技能回报的演变：一种使用面板数据的新方法
33407.authors: Lance Lochner, Youngmin Park, Youngki Shin
33407.abstract: Economists disagree about the factors driving the substantial increase in residual wage inequality in the US over the past few decades. To identify changes in the returns to unobserved skills, we make a novel assumption about the dynamics of skills rather than about the stability of skill distributions across cohorts, as is standard. We show that our assumption is supported by data on test score dynamics for older workers in the HRS. Using survey data from the PSID and administrative data from the IRS and SSA, we estimate that the returns to unobserved skills declined substantially in the late-1980s and 1990s despite an increase in residual inequality. Accounting for firm-specific pay differences yields similar results. Extending our framework to consider occupational differences in returns to skill and multiple unobserved skills, we further show that skill returns display similar patterns for workers employed in each of cognitive, routine, and social occupations. Finally, our results suggest that increasing skill dispersion, driven by rising skill volatility, explains most of the growth in residual wage inequality since the 1980s.
33407.zh_abstract: 经济学家们对于过去几十年美国残差工资不平等大幅增加的驱动因素存在分歧。为了识别不可观测技能回报的变化，我们做出一个关于技能动态的新假设，而非像标准做法那样假设技能分布在代际间保持稳定。我们证明，我们的假设得到了HRS中老年工人考试成绩动态数据的支持。利用PSID的调查数据以及IRS和SSA的行政数据，我们估计，尽管残差不平等加剧，但不可观测技能的回报在1980年代末和1990年代大幅下降。考虑企业特定的薪酬差异会得到类似的结果。将我们的框架扩展到考虑技能回报的职业差异和多种不可观测技能，我们进一步表明，在认知型、常规型和社交型职业中就业的工人，其技能回报呈现出相似的模式。最后，我们的结果表明，由技能波动性上升驱动的技能离散度增加，解释了自1980年代以来残差工资不平等增长的大部分原因。

33406.title: Financial Looting and Controls on Resident Outflows
33406.zh_title: 金融掠夺与居民资本外流管制
33406.authors: Bo Li, Alessandro Rebucci, Hui Tong
33406.abstract: This paper develops a theory of preemptive controls on capital outflows by residents as a second-best tool to mitigate boom-bust cycles in domestic asset markets and prevent wealth transfers from uninformed traders to pump-and-dump speculators, or financial “looters,” as in Akerlof and Romer (1993). The model implies that when domestic financial regulation is imperfectly designed or enforced, controls on residents' outflows reduce retail investor manipulation (which we call looting), stabilize asset prices, and diminish capital flight. The paper also provides compelling evidence that supports the main implications of the model when applied to housing markets, which is particularly relevant to institutions in developing countries. We find that deposit outflows to haven countries increase before busts in house prices, and countries with stricter controls on resident outflows experience significantly more contained deposit outflows to such destinations. The empirical analysis reveals a similar pattern for new incorporations in haven countries based on data from the Panama Papers.
33406.zh_abstract: 本文发展了一个理论，将预防性居民资本外流管制视为一种次优工具，用以缓解国内资产市场的繁荣-萧条周期，并防止财富从不知情的交易者转移到“拉高出货”的投机者或金融“掠夺者”手中，如Akerlof和Romer (1993)所述。该模型意味着，当国内金融监管设计或执行不完善时，对居民资本外流的管制会减少散户投资者的操纵（我们称之为掠夺），稳定资产价格，并减少资本外逃。本文还提供了令人信服的证据，支持该模型在应用于住房市场时的主要含义，这对发展中国家的制度尤为重要。我们发现，在房价暴跌之前，流向避风港国家的存款外流会增加，而对居民资本外流管制更严格的国家，流向此类目的地的存款外流会受到显著抑制。基于巴拿马文件数据的实证分析显示，在避风港国家的新注册公司也呈现出类似模式。

33405.title: Does the Gender Wage Gap Actually Reflect Taste Discrimination Against Women?
33405.zh_title: 性别工资差距是否真的反映了针对女性的品味歧视？
33405.abstract: One explanation of the gender wage gap is taste discrimination, as in Becker (1957). Using U.S. data, we test for taste discrimination by constructing a novel measure of misogyny using Google Trends data on searches that include derogatory terms for women. We find—surprisingly, in our view—that misogyny is an economically meaningful and statistically significant predictor of the wage gap. We also test more explicit implications of taste discrimination. The data are inconsistent with the Becker taste discrimination model, based on the tests used in Charles and Guryan (2008). But the data are consistent with the effects of taste discrimination against women in search models (Black, 1995), in which discrimination on the part of even a small group of misogynists can result in a wage gap.
33405.zh_abstract: 性别工资差距的一种解释是品味歧视，如Becker (1957)所述。利用美国数据，我们通过构建一种新颖的厌女症衡量指标来检验品味歧视，该指标使用了包含针对女性贬义词汇的搜索词的Google Trends数据。我们发现——在我们看来令人惊讶的是——厌女症是工资差距的一个在经济意义上显著且在统计上显著的预测因子。我们还检验了品味歧视更明确的含义。基于Charles和Guryan (2008)使用的检验，数据与Becker的品味歧视模型不一致。但数据与搜索模型中针对女性的品味歧视效应一致（Black, 1995），在该模型中，即使是少数厌女者的歧视也可能导致工资差距。

33464.title: Quick-Fixing: Near-Rationality in Consumption and Savings Behavior
33464.zh_title: 快速修补：消费与储蓄行为中的近理性
33464.authors: Peter Andre, Joel P. Flynn, Georgios Nikolakoudis, Karthik Sastry
33464.abstract: When changing consumption-savings plans is costly, people may rely on quick-fixes: simple rules that avoid these costs. We field a novel survey to elicit the distribution of households’ consumption policy functions out of income shocks. Almost 70% of households follow one of four quick-fixes: they fully consume or save small shocks, but abruptly adjust their behavior for large shocks, and thereafter behave similarly. In a calibrated incomplete-markets model, quick-fixing is near-rational: the average opportunity cost of quick-fixing is only $\$16$ per quarter. Yet, this empirically realistic deviation from benchmark models significantly alters aggregate consumption responses to income shocks.
33464.zh_abstract: 当改变消费-储蓄计划成本高昂时，人们可能依赖快速修补：即避免这些成本的简单规则。我们进行了一项新颖的调查，以揭示家庭应对收入冲击的消费政策函数的分布。近70%的家庭遵循四种快速修补规则之一：他们完全消费或储蓄小额冲击，但对于大额冲击会突然调整其行为，此后行为相似。在一个校准的不完全市场模型中，快速修补是近理性的：快速修补的平均机会成本每季度仅为16美元。然而，这种与基准模型经验上相符的偏离显著改变了总体消费对收入冲击的反应。

33463.title: Market Competition and Shock Propagation: Implications for Margins and Distress
33463.zh_title: 市场竞争与冲击传导：对利润率和困境的影响
33463.authors: Winston Wei Dou, Shane A. Johnson, Wei Wu
33463.abstract: Using local natural disasters as a quasi-experimental setting, we show that adverse shocks lead both directly affected firms and their unaffected competitors to reduce profit margins by approximately 0.8 percentage points. These reductions stem from intensified market competition, driven by mechanisms including predatory pricing, inventory liquidation, and weakened tacit collusion. As unaffected competitors cut margins nearly one-for-one in response, their financial distress rises significantly, though not directly shocked. Spillover effects are concentrated in tradable industries and those with high entry barriers, large inventories, greater price flexibility, or tight financial constraints, revealing a novel channel for shock propagation across the economy.
33463.zh_abstract: 利用局部自然灾害作为准实验环境，我们表明不利冲击导致直接受影响的企业及其未受影响的竞争对手都将利润率降低约0.8个百分点。这些降低源于加剧的市场竞争，其驱动机制包括掠夺性定价、库存清算和弱化的默契合谋。由于未受影响的竞争对手几乎一对一地削减利润率，它们的财务困境显著上升，尽管并未直接受到冲击。溢出效应集中在可贸易行业以及那些具有高进入壁垒、高库存、更大价格灵活性或紧张财务约束的行业，揭示了冲击在整个经济中传导的一个新渠道。
33463.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, IO；JEL：G32, G33, L11

33462.title: Student Loan Forgiveness
33462.authors: Michael Dinerstein, Samuel Earnest, Dmitri K. Koustas, Constantine Yannelis
33462.abstract: Student loan forgiveness has been proposed as a means to alleviate soaring student loan burdens. This paper uses administrative credit bureau data to study the distributional, consumption, borrowing, and employment effects of the largest event of student loan forgiveness in history. Beginning in March 2021, the United States federal government ordered $\$132$ billion in student loans cancelled, or 7.8% of the total $\$1.7$ trillion in outstanding student debt. We estimate that forgiven borrowers’ predicted monthly earnings were $\$115$ higher than borrowers who did not receive forgiveness and $\$193$ more than the general population. We find that student loan forgiveness led to increases in mortgage, auto, and credit card debt by 9 cents for every dollar forgiven. Borrowers’ monthly earnings and employment fell, at increasing rates for each month post forgiveness. The implied Marginal Propensities for Consumption (MPC) and Earnings (MPE) are 0.27 and -0.49, respectively.
33462.zh_abstract: 学生贷款减免已被提议作为减轻飙升的学生贷款负担的一种手段。本文利用行政信用局数据，研究历史上最大规模学生贷款减免事件的分配效应、消费效应、借贷效应和就业效应。从2021年3月开始，美国联邦政府下令取消1320亿美元的学生贷款，占未偿学生债务总额1.7万亿美元的7.8%。我们估计，获得减免的借款人的预测月收入比未获得减免的借款人高115美元，比一般人群高193美元。我们发现，学生贷款减免导致每减免1美元，抵押贷款、汽车贷款和信用卡债务增加9美分。借款人的月收入和就业率下降，且减免后每个月下降速度递增。隐含的边际消费倾向（MPC）和边际收入倾向（MPE）分别为0.27和-0.49。
33462.meta: Programs：ED, LS, PE；JEL：G51, I22, I28, J29

33461.title: Sex-Based Wage Gaps in Nursing
33461.zh_title: 护理行业的性别工资差距
33461.authors: Pablo Estrada, Sara Markowitz, Alexia Witthaus
33461.abstract: Males comprise a small fraction of the nurse labor force, yet across the distribution of wages, male nurses earn more than females. In this paper, we use nurse survey data to decompose the sex-based wage gap and to explore why male nurses earn a premium in a female-dominated profession. We consider the role of traditional factors such as human capital and family structure, along with explanations that are more specific to nursing. Results indicate that overtime pay is a significant factor, particularly among hospital workers, but otherwise, after accounting for an extensive set of job-related characteristics, the wage gap persists.
33461.zh_abstract: 男性在护理劳动力中占比很小，然而在整个工资分布中，男性护士的收入高于女性。在本文中，我们利用护士调查数据来分解基于性别的工资差距，并探讨为何在一个女性主导的职业中男性护士能获得溢价。我们考虑了传统因素的作用，如人力资本和家庭结构，以及更特定于护理行业的解释。结果表明，加班费是一个重要因素，尤其是在医院工作者中，但除此之外，在考虑了广泛的工作相关特征后，工资差距依然存在。

33460.title: Vanguard: Black Veterans and Civil Rights after World War I
33460.zh_title: 先锋：第一次世界大战后的黑人退伍军人与民权运动
33460.abstract: Nearly 400,000 Black men were drafted into the National Army during World War I, where they toiled in segregated units and received little formal training. Leveraging novel variation from the WWI draft lottery and millions of digitized military and NAACP records, we document the pioneering role these men would play in the early civil rights movement. Relative to observably similar individuals from the same draft board, Black men randomly inducted into the Army were significantly more likely to join the nascent NAACP and to become prominent community leaders in the New Negro era. We find little evidence that these effects are explained by migration or improved socioeconomic status. Rather, corroborating historical accounts about the catalyzing influence of institutional racism in the military, we show that increased civic activism was driven by soldiers who experienced the most discriminatory treatment while serving their country.
33460.zh_abstract: 第一次世界大战期间，近40万黑人男性被征召加入国民军，他们在种族隔离的部队中劳作，几乎没有接受过正规训练。利用一战征兵抽签带来的新颖变异以及数百万份数字化军事记录和全国有色人种协进会（NAACP）记录，我们记录了这些男性在早期民权运动中所发挥的开创性作用。与来自同一征兵委员会、在可观测特征上相似的个体相比，被随机征召入伍的黑人男性更有可能加入当时尚处于萌芽阶段的NAACP，并在新黑人时代成为杰出的社区领袖。我们几乎没有发现证据表明这些影响是由迁移或社会经济地位的改善所解释的。相反，与关于军队中制度性种族主义的催化作用的历史叙述相一致，我们表明，公民参与度的提高是由那些在为国家服务时遭受最歧视性待遇的士兵所驱动的。
33460.meta: Programs：DAE, POL；JEL：J15, J78, N0, N4, P0, Z1

33459.title: Reconciling Macroeconomics and Finance for the U.S. Corporate Sector: 1929 to Present
33459.zh_title: 调和美国企业部门的宏观经济学与金融学：1929年至今
33459.authors: Andrew Atkeson, Jonathan Heathcote, Fabrizio Perri
33459.abstract: We examine how to quantitatively reconcile the high volatility of market valuations of U.S. corporations with the relative stability of macroeconomic quantities since 1929. Macroeconomic and financial variables are measured in a consistent fashion using the Integrated Macroeconomic Accounts (IMA) of the United States. We first use a finance- style valuation model that builds on Campbell and Shiller (1987) to interpret fluctuations in the market value of U.S. corporations from 1929 to 2023, using these IMA data. We find that fluctuations in expected cash flows to firm owners have been the dominant driver of those fluctuations in value; fluctuations in expected rates of return have played a smaller role. We then develop a stochastic growth model, extended to incorporate factorless income, which we use to decompose corporate cash flows and associated valuations into income and value due to physical capital and factorless income. Finally, we ask whether expected returns to investing in capital in our macroeconomic model are consistent with the series for expected returns estimated from our finance-style valuation model. We find that they are. In this sense, we reconcile volatile market valuations and stable capital output ratios.
33459.zh_abstract: 我们研究了如何从数量上调和自1929年以来美国公司市场估值的高波动性与宏观经济总量的相对稳定性。我们使用美国的综合宏观经济账户（IMA）以一致的方式衡量宏观经济和金融变量。我们首先采用一种基于Campbell和Shiller（1987）的金融风格估值模型，利用这些IMA数据来解释1929年至2023年美国公司市场价值的波动。我们发现，对企业所有者预期现金流的波动是这些价值波动的主要驱动因素；预期回报率的波动作用较小。然后，我们开发了一个随机增长模型，并扩展以纳入无要素收入，我们使用该模型将公司现金流及相关估值分解为来自物质资本和无要素收入的收入与价值。最后，我们询问，在我们的宏观经济模型中，投资于资本的预期回报是否与我们从金融风格估值模型中估计出的预期回报序列一致。我们发现它们是一致的。在这个意义上，我们调和了波动的市场估值与稳定的资本产出比率。

33458.title: Local GDP Estimates Around the World
33458.abstract: We use high-resolution spatial data to build a novel global annual gridded GDP dataset at 1°, 0.5°, and 0.25° resolutions from 2012 onward. Our random forest model trained on local and national GDP achieves an R² above 0.92 for GDP levels and above 0.62 for annual changes in regions left out of the training sample. By incorporating diverse indicators beyond population and nighttime lights, our estimates offer more precise subnational GDP measurements for analyzing economic shocks, local policies, and regional disparities. We evaluate the precision of our estimates with a sample case of COVID-19’s impact on local GDP in China.
33458.zh_abstract: 我们利用高分辨率空间数据，构建了一个新颖的全球年度网格化GDP数据集，分辨率分别为1°、0.5°和0.25°，时间跨度从2012年至今。我们的随机森林模型在本地和国家GDP数据上训练，对于GDP水平，在训练样本中未包含的地区，R²超过0.92；对于年度变化，R²超过0.62。通过纳入除人口和夜间灯光之外的多样化指标，我们的估算为分析经济冲击、地方政策和区域差异提供了更精确的次国家级GDP测量。我们以COVID-19对中国地方GDP影响的样本案例来评估我们估算的精确性。

33457.title: The Therapeutic Consequences of the War: World War II and the 20th-Century Expansion of Biomedicine
33457.zh_title: 战争的疗愈后果：第二次世界大战与20世纪生物医学的扩张
33457.authors: Daniel P. Gross, Bhaven N. Sampat
33457.abstract: During World War II, the U.S. Committee on Medical Research (CMR) undertook an integrated, cross-sectoral effort to develop medical science and technology for war, representing the U.S. government's first substantial investment in medical research. Although it had mixed results during the war, using data on all CMR research contracts we show that it laid a foundation for the postwar takeoff of the U.S. biomedical innovation system. New and emerging research areas it supported experienced rapid growth in postwar science. It also fueled new postwar drug development, influenced medical practice, and shaped extramural research funding at the National Institutes of Health. These changes were accompanied by growing interdependence between science and technology and between firms, universities, and the federal government, reflecting biomedicine's increasingly systemic character. The evidence points to the long-run effects coordinated, integrative research policy can have in spurring the development of innovation systems and shifting technology sectors into a high-investment, high-growth development path.
33457.zh_abstract: 在第二次世界大战期间，美国医学研究委员会（CMR）进行了一项综合性的、跨部门的努力，为战争开发医学科学技术，这代表了美国政府首次对医学研究进行实质性投资。尽管在战争期间结果喜忧参半，但利用所有CMR研究合同的数据，我们表明它为战后美国生物医学创新体系的腾飞奠定了基础。它所支持的新兴研究领域在战后科学中经历了快速增长。它还推动了战后新药开发，影响了医疗实践，并塑造了美国国立卫生研究院（NIH）的院外研究资助。这些变化伴随着科学与技术之间、以及企业、大学和联邦政府之间日益增长的相互依存关系，反映了生物医学日益系统化的特征。证据表明，协调一致的综合性研究政策在刺激创新体系发展和推动技术部门进入高投资、高增长的发展路径方面可以产生长期效应。
33457.meta: Programs：DAE, EH, PE, PR；JEL：H51, H56, N42, N72, O31, O32, O33, O38

33456.title: The Experimentalist Looks Within: Toward an Understanding of Within-Subject Experimental Designs
33456.zh_title: 实验主义者向内看：理解被试内实验设计
33456.abstract: The traditional approach in experimental economics is to use a between-subject design: the analyst places each unit in treatment or control simultaneously and recovers treatment effects via differencing conditional expectations. Within-subject designs represent a significant departure from this method, as the same unit is observed in both treatment and control conditions sequentially. While many might consider the choice straightforward (always opt for a between-subject design), given the distinct benefits of within-subject designs, I argue that researchers should meticulously weigh the advantages and disadvantages of each design type. In doing so, I propose a categorization for within-subject designs based on the plausibility of recovering an internally valid estimate. In one instance, which I denote as stealth designs, the analyst should unequivocally choose a within-subject design rather than a between-subject design.
33456.zh_abstract: 实验经济学的传统方法是使用被试间设计：分析者同时将每个单位置于处理组或对照组，并通过条件期望之差来恢复处理效应。被试内设计与此方法有显著不同，因为同一个单位被依次观察到处于处理和控制两种状态。尽管许多人可能认为选择是直截了当的（总是选择被试间设计），但考虑到被试内设计的独特优势，我认为研究人员应该仔细权衡每种设计类型的优缺点。在此过程中，我基于恢复内部有效估计的合理性，提出了一种对被试内设计的分类。在一种我称之为“隐蔽设计”的情况下，分析者应该明确选择被试内设计而非被试间设计。
33456.meta: Programs：DEV, IO, LS, PE；JEL：C9, C90, C91, C92, C93, C99

33455.title: ESG Is The Most Polarizing Nonwage Amenity: Evidence from a Field Experiment in Brazil
33455.zh_title: ESG是最具两极分化效应的非工资福利：来自巴西田野实验的证据
33455.authors: Emanuele Colonnelli, Timothy McQuade, Gabriel Ramos, Thomas Rauter, Olivia Xiong
33455.abstract: We examine job-seekers' heterogeneous preferences for nonwage amenities, with a focus on environmental, social, and governance (ESG) practices, using an incentivized field experiment in Brazil. Our findings reveal that ESG is the most polarizing nonwage amenity across multiple sociodemographic groups, with the strongest preferences observed among highly educated, white, and politically liberal individuals (Colonnelli et al., 2025). While women report a stronger preference for work-from-home policies, all other nonwage amenities exhibit minimal variation across sociodemographic groups. Our findings highlight the critical role of corporate values in shaping economic outcomes within an increasingly polarized society.
33455.zh_abstract: 我们利用在巴西进行的一项激励性田野实验，考察了求职者对非工资福利的异质性偏好，重点关注环境、社会和治理（ESG）实践。我们的研究结果显示，在多个社会人口群体中，ESG是最具两极分化效应的非工资福利，在受过高等教育、白人和政治自由派个体中观察到的偏好最强（Colonnelli等人，2025）。虽然女性报告对居家办公政策有更强的偏好，但所有其他非工资福利在不同社会人口群体间表现出最小的差异。我们的研究结果突显了企业价值观在日益两极分化的社会中塑造经济结果的关键作用。
33455.meta: Programs：AP, CF, DEV, LE, LS, PE, POL, PR；JEL：G0, J0, P0

33454.title: A Test of Dominant Currency Hypothesis: Evidence From a Non-USD-non-Euro Country
33454.zh_title: 主导货币假说的检验：来自非美元非欧元国家的证据
33454.authors: Yushi Yoshida, Takatoshi Ito, Junko Shimizu, Kiyotaka Sato, Taiyo Yoshimi, Uraku Yoshimoto
33454.abstract: We examine the determinants and the dynamics of the exchange rate pass-through of the Japanese exporters, utilizing the official Customs declaration data. We first estimated the invoicing currency exchange rate pass-through and found that export prices invoiced in producer currency are the most rigid. Among local currency or vehicle currency use, US dollar invoicing is relatively more rigid than non-US dollar invoicing. The destination exchange rate pass-through estimates for local currency invoicing are between 35 and 40 percent, whereas those for Japanese yen or US dollar invoicing are close to complete. In addition, we find these discrepancies are even more accentuated in the longer run by analyzing the dynamics of the exchange rate pass-through.
33454.zh_abstract: 我们利用官方海关申报数据，考察了日本出口商汇率传递的决定因素和动态变化。我们首先估算了计价货币的汇率传递，发现以生产者货币计价的出口价格最为刚性。在本地货币或媒介货币的使用中，美元计价的刚性相对高于非美元计价。对于本地货币计价，目的地汇率传递的估计值在35%到40%之间，而对于日元或美元计价，则接近于完全传递。此外，通过分析汇率传递的动态变化，我们发现这些差异在长期内更加显著。

33453.title: Spatial Economics for Low- and Middle-Income Countries
33453.zh_title: 低收入和中等收入国家的空间经济学
33453.authors: Gharad T. Bryan, Kyra Frye, Melanie Morten
33453.abstract: Research at the intersection of development and spatial economics is increasingly important to address pressing issues in rapidly-urbanizing cities in low- and middle- income countries. This handbook chapter presents the canonical spatial model and then explores it through the lens of development economics, pointing out the "on-the-ground" facts of missing markets, frictions, and context-specific parameters that are often absent in applications of the model. We then discuss what the existing literature and the spatial model tell us about the optimal allocation of labor across space. We close by highlighting exciting possibilities for future work that integrates the spatial model with the reality of low- and middle-income countries.
33453.zh_abstract: 发展经济学与空间经济学交叉领域的研究对于解决低收入和中等收入国家快速城市化城市中的紧迫问题日益重要。本手册章节首先介绍了经典的空间模型，然后通过发展经济学的视角对其进行探讨，指出了模型应用中常常缺失的“实地”事实，如市场缺失、摩擦和特定情境的参数。接着，我们讨论了现有文献和空间模型关于劳动力在空间上的最优配置告诉了我们什么。最后，我们强调了未来将空间模型与低收入和中等收入国家现实相结合的研究令人兴奋的可能性。

33452.title: Rigidities in Transportation and Supply Chain Disruptions
33452.zh_title: 运输业的刚性与供应链中断
33452.authors: Giulia Brancaccio, Myrto Kalouptsidi, Theodore Papageorgiou
33452.abstract: In this paper we provide a simple and intuitive story for supply chain disruptions driven by the rigidities in the transportation sector. Focusing on maritime shipping, we argue that the frequent macroeconomic shocks that shape demand for transportation, meet a highly inelastic supply curve for transportation services. The steepness is driven by equilibrium bottlenecks in ships (transportation agents) and ports (transportation infrastructure). This leads to highly volatile shipping prices and port congestion, affecting importers and exporters worldwide. We discuss how both global trade and inflation react to these costs, so that disruptions pass through to the entire economy.
33452.zh_abstract: 在本文中，我们提供了一个由运输业刚性驱动的供应链中断的简单直观解释。聚焦于海运，我们认为，频繁塑造运输需求的宏观经济冲击，遭遇了高度缺乏弹性的运输服务供给曲线。这种陡峭性是由船舶（运输主体）和港口（运输基础设施）的均衡瓶颈所驱动的。这导致了高度波动的航运价格和港口拥堵，影响了全球的进口商和出口商。我们讨论了全球贸易和通胀如何对这些成本做出反应，从而使中断传导至整个经济。
33452.meta: Programs：EFG, IO, ITI；JEL：E30, F0, L0, L90, L91, R4

33451.title: AI and Women's Employment in Europe
33451.zh_title: 人工智能与欧洲的女性就业
33451.authors: Stefania Albanesi, António Dias da Silva, Juan F. Jimeno, Ana Lamo, Alena Wabitsch
33451.abstract: We examine the link between the diffusion of artificial intelligence (AI) enabled technologies and changes in the female employment share in 16 European countries over the period 2011-2019. Using data for occupations at the 3-digit level, we find that on average female employment shares increased in occupations more exposed to AI. Countries with high initial female labor force participation and higher initial female relative education show a stronger positive association. While there exists heterogeneity across countries, almost all show a positive relation between changes in female employment shares within occupations and exposure to AI-enabled automation.
33451.zh_abstract: 我们研究了2011-2019年期间，16个欧洲国家中人工智能（AI）赋能技术的扩散与女性就业份额变化之间的联系。使用三位数职业层面的数据，我们发现，平均而言，在更易受AI影响的职业中，女性就业份额有所增加。初始女性劳动力参与率较高且初始女性相对教育水平较高的国家，显示出更强的正相关关系。尽管各国之间存在异质性，但几乎所有国家都显示出，职业内部女性就业份额的变化与AI赋能自动化的暴露程度之间存在正相关关系。

33450.title: Moral Hazard among the Employed: Evidence from Regression Discontinuity
33450.zh_title: 就业者中的道德风险：来自断点回归的证据
33450.authors: Jonas Jessen, Robin Jessen, Andrew C. Johnston, Ewa Gałecka-Burdziak
33450.abstract: We exploit policy discontinuities in Poland's unemployment insurance to examine the causal effect of changes to both benefit durations and levels. Using a regression discontinuity approach, we uncover three findings: (1) Higher benefit levels distort employment more than benefit extensions. (2) Benefit durations and levels interact: Longer durations substantially increase the distortionary effect of more generous payments.
