(3) Higher payments increase the transition of employed workers into unemployment. We develop a model of optimal unemployment insurance that accounts for moral hazard among both employed and unemployed workers. Notably, for level increases, distortionary costs are larger among the employed than unemployed.
33450.zh_abstract: 我们利用波兰失业保险中的政策不连续性，来检验福利期限和福利水平变化的因果效应。使用断点回归方法，我们发现了三个结果：（1）更高的福利水平比延长福利期限对就业的扭曲更大。（2）福利期限和福利水平存在交互作用：更长的期限显著增加了更慷慨支付带来的扭曲效应。（3）更高的支付增加了就业工人向失业的转变。我们构建了一个最优失业保险模型，该模型考虑了就业者和失业者中的道德风险。值得注意的是，对于福利水平的增加，就业者中的扭曲成本大于失业者。

33449.title: Does Loan Securitization Expose Borrowers to Non-Bank Investor Shocks?—Evidence from Insurers
33449.zh_title: 贷款证券化是否使借款人暴露于非银行投资者冲击？——来自保险公司的证据
33449.authors: Abhishek Bhardwaj, Shan Ge, Saptarshi Mukherjee
33449.abstract: CLOs fund 65% of syndicated loans, theoretically insulating borrowers from bank and idiosyncratic investor shocks. However, concentrated capital and sticky relationships expose firms to idiosyncratic shocks to insurers, the largest CLO investors. We find that: 1) insurers experiencing favorable cash flows invest more in CLOs, especially with familiar managers; 2) CLO managers exposed to these cash flows launch more deals; 3) using an instrumental–variable approach, affected firms take out more loans at lower spreads, increase employment, and expand operations; 4) effects are stronger for private than public firms. These findings reveal significant frictions in the loan securitization market.
33449.zh_abstract: CLO（贷款抵押债券）为65%的银团贷款提供资金，理论上使借款人免受银行和特定投资者冲击的影响。然而，集中的资本和粘性关系使企业暴露于CLO最大投资者——保险公司——的特定冲击。我们发现：1）现金流状况良好的保险公司更多地投资于CLO，尤其是与熟悉的经理人合作；2）受这些现金流影响的CLO经理人发起了更多交易；3）使用工具变量方法，受影响的企业以更低的利差获得更多贷款，增加了就业并扩大了运营；4）对私营企业的影响强于上市公司。这些发现揭示了贷款证券化市场中显著的摩擦。

33448.title: Childbirth and Firm Performance: Evidence from Norwegian Entrepreneurs
33448.zh_title: 生育与公司绩效：来自挪威企业家的证据
33448.authors: John Bonney, Luigi Pistaferri, Alessandra Voena
33448.abstract: Using multiple administrative data sources from Norway, we examine how firm performance changes after entrepreneurs become parents. Female-owned businesses experience a substantial decline in profits, steadily decreasing to 30% below baseline ten years post-childbirth. In contrast, male-owned businesses show no decline, often growing in revenues and costs after childbirth. The profit decline for female-owned firms is most pronounced among highly capable entrepreneurs, women who are majority owners, and those with working spouses. Entrepreneurial effort is key to performance, and our findings suggest that time demands from childbirth and childcare are a significant determinant of the decline in firm profits.
33448.zh_abstract: 利用挪威的多个行政数据来源，我们研究了企业家成为父母后公司绩效的变化。女性拥有的企业在利润上经历了显著下降，在生育后十年内稳步降至基线以下30%。相比之下，男性拥有的企业没有显示出下降，在生育后收入和成本通常有所增长。女性拥有企业的利润下降在能力最强的企业家、女性多数股东以及配偶有工作的女性中最为显著。企业家努力是绩效的关键，我们的发现表明，生育和育儿带来的时间需求是公司利润下降的一个重要决定因素。
33448.meta: Programs：CH, LS, PR；JEL：J13, J16, L25, L26

33447.title: The Hidden Toll of Airborne Lead: Infant Mortality Impacts of Industrial Lead Pollution
33447.zh_title: 空气中铅的隐性代价：工业铅污染对婴儿死亡率的影响
33447.authors: Karen Clay, Edson R. Severnini, Xiao Wang
33447.abstract: This paper uses U.S. Toxic Release Inventory data on industrial air lead emissions to provide IV estimates of the effects of air lead concentration on infant mortality. The causal effect of lead on infant mortality is identified by annual variation in air fugitive lead emissions interacted with wind speed near reporting plants, which together determine local ambient lead concentration. Unlike stack emissions, which occur routinely and may prompt avoidance behavior, fugitive emissions are intermittent and influenced by both historical and current factors, such as wind speed variation, making them difficult to avoid. The paper has two main findings. First, higher air lead concentration causes higher infant mortality in the first month and in the first year, suggesting that both in utero and environmental exposures matter. Second, higher lead concentration increases deaths from low birthweight, sudden unexplained infant death (SUID), and respiratory and nervous system causes, which is consistent with findings from animal studies, even when accounting for behavioral responses. Back of the envelope calculations indicate that declines in industrial air lead emissions prevented more than 300 infant deaths per year, generating benefots of at least $\$3.5$ billion annually in 2023 dollars.
33447.zh_abstract: 本文利用美国有毒物质释放清单中关于工业空气铅排放的数据，提供了空气铅浓度对婴儿死亡率影响的工具变量估计。铅对婴儿死亡率的因果效应是通过报告工厂附近年度空气无组织铅排放量与风速的交互作用来识别的，这两者共同决定了当地的环境铅浓度。与常规排放（可能引发规避行为）不同，无组织排放是间歇性的，并受历史和当前因素（如风速变化）的影响，因此难以规避。本文有两个主要发现。首先，较高的空气铅浓度会导致第一个月和第一年内更高的婴儿死亡率，这表明宫内暴露和环境暴露都很重要。其次，较高的铅浓度会增加因低出生体重、婴儿猝死综合征（SUID）以及呼吸和神经系统原因导致的死亡，这与动物研究的发现一致，即使在考虑了行为反应后也是如此。粗略计算表明，工业空气铅排放的减少每年防止了超过300例婴儿死亡，按2023年美元计算，每年产生至少35亿美元的收益。

33446.title: Did the Modern Mortgage Set the Stage for the U.S. Baby Boom?
33446.zh_title: 现代抵押贷款是否为美国婴儿潮奠定了基础？
33446.authors: Lisa J. Dettling, Melissa Schettini Kearney
33446.abstract: This paper proposes that the adoption of the modern U.S. mortgage (i.e., low down payment, long-term, and fixed-rate)—led by the Federal Housing Administration (FHA) and Veteran’s Administration (VA) loan insurance programs—set the stage for the mid-twentieth century U.S. baby boom by dramatically raising rates of home ownership for young families. Using newly digitized data on FHA- and VA- backed loan issuance and births by state-year, and a novel instrumental variables strategy that isolates supply-side variation in loan issuance, we find that the FHA and VA mortgage insurance programs led to 3 million additional births from 1935-1957, roughly 10 percent of the excess births in the baby boom. Aggregate effects mask differences by group—we find no effects of FHA/VA lending on births for Nonwhite women, consistent with well-documented racial discrimination in these lending programs. Our results highlight the importance of access to home ownership for fertility decisions.
33446.zh_abstract: 本文提出，现代美国抵押贷款（即低首付、长期、固定利率）的采用——由联邦住房管理局（FHA）和退伍军人管理局（VA）贷款保险计划引领——通过显著提高年轻家庭的住房拥有率，为20世纪中叶的美国婴儿潮奠定了基础。利用新近数字化的按州-年份划分的FHA和VA支持贷款发放及出生数据，以及一种新颖的、隔离贷款发放供给侧变异的工具变量策略，我们发现，FHA和VA抵押贷款保险计划在1935年至1957年间导致了300万额外出生，约占婴儿潮期间超额出生人数的10%。总体效应掩盖了群体间的差异——我们发现FHA/VA贷款对非白人女性的出生没有影响，这与这些贷款计划中记录在案的种族歧视现象一致。我们的结果强调了获得住房所有权对生育决策的重要性。
33446.meta: Programs：CH, DAE, LS, ME, PE；JEL：G21, H31, J13, N32, R38

33445.title: Why Workers Stay: Pay, Beliefs, and Attachment
33445.zh_title: 工人为何留下：薪酬、信念与依附
33445.authors: Sydnee Caldwell, Ingrid Haegele, Jörg Heining
33445.abstract: Workers often remain with their employer even when outside firms offer higher pay. This may reflect information frictions or preferences. We use a large-scale survey of full-time German workers, linked to Social Security records, to elicit pay expectations and preferences over specific outside firms. Workers believe outside pay varies across firms and direct their search toward higher-paying employers. Expected pay premia are highly correlated with administrative pay measures observed and with workers’ amenity valuations. Yet most workers would not switch firms—even for substantial raises at named destination firms. Implied switching costs range from 7 to 18% of annual pay. Attachment varies across firms and is not explained by amenities or switching costs, suggesting residual firm-specific factors shape mobility.
33445.zh_abstract: 即使外部公司提供更高的薪酬，工人也常常留在原雇主处。这可能反映了信息摩擦或偏好。我们使用一项针对德国全职员工的大规模调查（与社保记录相关联），来获取薪酬预期和对特定外部公司的偏好。工人认为外部薪酬因公司而异，并将求职方向对准薪酬更高的雇主。预期的薪酬溢价与观察到的行政薪酬指标以及工人的便利设施估值高度相关。然而，大多数工人不会更换公司——即使在指定的目标公司获得大幅加薪的情况下。隐含的转换成本范围为年度薪酬的7%至18%。依附程度因公司而异，且无法用便利设施或转换成本来解释，这表明剩余的公司特定因素塑造了流动性。

33444.title: Income Equality in The Nordic Countries: Myths, Facts, and Lessons
33444.zh_title: 北欧国家的收入平等：神话、事实与启示
33444.authors: Magne Mogstad, Kjell G. Salvanes, Gaute Torsvik
33444.abstract: Policymakers, public commentators, and researchers often cite the Nordic countries as examples of a social and economic model that successfully combines low income inequality with prosperity and growth. This article aims to critically assess this claim by integrating theoretical perspectives and empirical evidence to illustrate how the Nordic model functions and why these countries experience low inequality. Our analysis suggests that income equality in the Nordics is primarily driven by a significant compression of hourly wages, reducing the returns to labor market skills and education. This appears to be achieved through a wage bargaining system characterized by strong coordination both within and across industries. This finding contrasts with other commonly cited explanations for Nordic income equality, such as redistribution through the tax-transfer system, public spending on goods that complement employment, and public policies aimed at equalizing skills and human capital distribution. We consider the potential lessons for other economies that seek to reduce income equality. We conclude by discussing several underexplored or unresolved questions and issues.
33444.zh_abstract: 政策制定者、公共评论员和研究人员经常将北欧国家视为成功将低收入不平等与繁荣增长相结合的社会经济模式的典范。本文旨在通过整合理论视角与实证证据来批判性地评估这一论断，以阐明北欧模式如何运作以及这些国家为何经历低不平等。我们的分析表明，北欧的收入平等主要由小时工资的显著压缩驱动，这降低了劳动力市场技能和教育的回报。这似乎是通过一种以行业内部和跨行业高度协调为特征的工资谈判体系实现的。这一发现与其他常见的对北欧收入平等的解释形成对比，例如通过税收转移体系进行的再分配、旨在补充就业的公共支出，以及旨在均衡技能和人力资本分布的公共政策。我们考虑了其他寻求减少收入不平等的经济体可以汲取的潜在教训。最后，我们讨论了若干尚未充分探索或未解决的问题与议题。

33443.title: Spatial Dynamics
33443.abstract: We examine the recent literature that studies the spatial distribution of economic activity across both space and time. We discuss the methodological advances enabling the incorporation of dynamic forces of economic activity—such as endogenous innovation, forward-looking location choices, capital and asset accumulation, idea diffusion, and stochastic fundamentals—into frameworks with many heterogeneous locations and a rich economic geography. These frameworks remain tractable for quantitative evaluations. We also discuss the wide range of empirical questions explored in recent work through the lens of these frameworks, including the global and local economic impacts of climate change, the dynamic effects of trade and migration policy, labor market adjustments to import competition, the spatial consequences of structural change, the dynamic effects of place-based policies, and the long-run spatial effects of large-scale infrastructure projects.
33443.zh_abstract: 我们考察了近期研究经济活动的空间分布在跨空间与跨时间维度上的文献。我们讨论了方法论上的进展，这些进展使得将经济活动的动态力量——如内生创新、前瞻性的区位选择、资本与资产积累、思想扩散以及随机基本面——纳入具有许多异质性区位和丰富经济地理的框架成为可能。这些框架在定量评估中仍然保持可处理性。我们还讨论了近期研究通过这些框架所探索的广泛实证问题，包括气候变化的全球和局部经济影响、贸易和移民政策的动态效应、劳动力市场对进口竞争的调整、结构变化的空间后果、地方性政策的动态效应，以及大型基础设施项目的长期空间影响。
33443.meta: Programs：DEV, EEE, EFG, ITI, LS, PR；JEL：F10, F16, F22, O11, O18, O33, R11, R12, R23

33442.title: Institutions, Technology and Prosperity
33442.abstract: This paper reviews the main motivations and arguments of my work on comparative development, colonialism and institutional change, which was often carried out jointly with James Robinson and Simon Johnson. I then provide a simple framework to organize these ideas and connect them with my research on innovation and technology. The framework is centered around a utility-technology possibilities frontier, which delineates the possible distributions of resources in a society both for given technology and working via different technological choices. It highlights how various types of institutions, market structures, norms and ideologies influence moves along the frontier and shifts of the frontier, and it provides a simple formalization of the social forces that lead to institutional persistence and those that can trigger institutional change. The framework also enables us to conceptualize how, during periods of disruption, existing—and sometimes quite small—differences can have amplified effects on prosperity and institutional trajectories. In this way, it suggests some parallels between different disruptive periods, including the onset of European colonialism, the spread (or lack thereof) of industrial technologies in the 19th century, and decisions related to the use, adoption and development of AI today.
33442.zh_abstract: 本文回顾了我在比较发展、殖民主义和制度变迁方面工作的主要动机和论点，这些工作通常是与詹姆斯·罗宾逊和西蒙·约翰逊合作完成的。然后，我提供了一个简单的框架来组织这些思想，并将其与我在创新和技术方面的研究联系起来。该框架围绕一个效用-技术可能性前沿展开，该前沿描绘了在给定技术条件下以及通过不同的技术选择，社会中资源可能的分配方式。它强调了各种类型的制度、市场结构、规范和意识形态如何影响沿前沿的移动和前沿的移动，并提供了一个关于导致制度持续存在的社会力量以及那些可能触发制度变迁的社会力量的简单形式化表述。该框架还使我们能够概念化，在动荡时期，现有的——有时是相当微小的——差异如何对繁荣和制度轨迹产生放大效应。通过这种方式，它暗示了不同动荡时期之间的一些相似之处，包括欧洲殖民主义的开始、19世纪工业技术的传播（或缺乏传播），以及今天与人工智能的使用、采用和发展相关的决策。

33441.title: A Neoclassical Model of the World Financial Cycle
33441.zh_title: 世界金融周期的新古典模型
33441.authors: Yan Bai, Patrick J. Kehoe, Pierlauro Lopez, Fabrizio Perri
33441.abstract: Emerging markets face large and persistent fluctuations in sovereign spreads. To what extent are these fluctuations driven by local shocks versus financial conditions in advanced economies? To answer this question, we develop a neoclassical business cycle model of a world economy with an advanced country, the North, and many emerging market economies, the South. Northern households invest in domestic stocks, domestic defaultable bonds, and international sovereign debt. Over the 2008-2016 period, the global cycle phase, the North accounts for 68% of Southern spreads’ fluctuations. Over the whole 1994-2024 period, however, Northern shocks account for less than 20% of these fluctuations.
33441.zh_abstract: 新兴市场面临巨大且持续的主权利差波动。这些波动在多大程度上是由本地冲击驱动，而非由发达经济体的金融状况驱动？为了回答这个问题，我们构建了一个世界经济的新古典商业周期模型，该世界包含一个发达国家（北方）和许多新兴市场经济体（南方）。北方家庭投资于国内股票、国内可违约债券以及国际主权债务。在2008年至2016年期间，即全球周期阶段，北方解释了南方利差波动的68%。然而，在整个1994年至2024年期间，北方冲击仅解释了这些波动的不到20%。

33440.title: Do Inflation Expectations Become More Anchored During a Disinflation Episode? Evidence for Euro Area Firms
33440.zh_title: 在通货紧缩期间通胀预期会变得更加锚定吗？来自欧元区企业的证据
33440.authors: Ursel Baumann, Annalisa Ferrando, Dimitris Georgarakos, Yuriy Gorodnichenko, Timo Reinelt
33440.abstract: Does a successful disinflation contribute to the anchoring of inflation expectations? We provide novel survey evidence on the dynamics of euro area firms’ inflation expectations during the disinflation episode since 2022. We show that firms’ short term inflation expectations declined steadily towards the inflation target as the disinflation progressed. However, we also document a thick tail in longer-term inflation expectations, substantial disagreement about the inflation outlook, and an increased sensitivity of longer-term inflation expectations to short-term inflation expectations. These findings suggest that it may take more time to bring inflation expectations fully in line with central bank objectives.
33440.zh_abstract: 成功的通货紧缩是否有助于通胀预期的锚定？我们提供了关于自2022年以来通货紧缩期间欧元区企业通胀预期动态的新调查证据。我们表明，随着通货紧缩的推进，企业的短期通胀预期稳步下降，趋向通胀目标。然而，我们也记录了长期通胀预期中存在厚尾分布、对通胀前景存在显著分歧，以及长期通胀预期对短期通胀预期的敏感性增加。这些发现表明，可能需要更多时间才能使通胀预期完全符合央行的目标。

33495.title: Does Peer Review Penalize Scientific Risk Taking? Evidence from NIH Grant Renewals
33495.zh_title: 同行评审会惩罚科学冒险吗？来自NIH资助续期的证据
33495.abstract: Scientific projects that carry a high degree of risk may be more likely to lead to breakthroughs yet also face challenges in winning the support necessary to be carried out. We analyze the determinants of renewal for more than 100,000 R01 grants from the National Institutes of Health between 1980 and 2015. We use four distinct proxies to measure risk taking: extreme tail outcomes, disruptiveness, pivoting from an investigator’s prior work, and standing out from the crowd in one’s field. After carefully controlling for investigator, grant, and institution characteristics, we measure the association between risk taking and grant renewal. Across each of these measures, we find that risky grants are renewed at markedly lower rates than less risky ones. We also provide evidence that the magnitude of the risk penalty is magnified for more novel areas of research and novice investigators, consistent with the academic community’s perception that current scientific institutions do not motivate exploratory research adequately.
33495.zh_abstract: 具有高风险的科学项目可能更有可能带来突破，但也面临在获得开展所需支持方面的挑战。我们分析了1980年至2015年间美国国立卫生研究院超过10万个R01资助续期的决定因素。我们使用四个不同的代理指标来衡量冒险行为：极端尾部结果、颠覆性、偏离研究者先前工作的转向，以及在自身领域中脱颖而出。在仔细控制了研究者、资助和机构特征后，我们衡量了冒险行为与资助续期之间的关联。在这些指标中的每一个上，我们发现高风险资助的续期率明显低于低风险资助。我们还提供证据表明，风险惩罚的幅度对于更新颖的研究领域和新手研究者来说更大，这与学术界认为当前科学机构未能充分激励探索性研究的看法一致。

33494.title: Guaranteed Employment in Rural India: Intra-Household Labor and Resource Allocation Consequences
33494.zh_title: 印度农村的就业保障：家庭内部劳动力和资源配置后果
33494.abstract: I investigate the intra-household labor and resource allocation consequences of an employment guarantee targeting rural households in India. The guarantee insures household earnings, replacing women as added workers and shutting down a motive for saving. Despite sizable program-job take-up, the guarantee decreases participation in other working activities, and, thus, the labor force participation of married women and total time worked by their husbands. The guarantee accounts for up to 30% of a recent countrywide decrease in rural female labor force participation. Though it increases household consumption, the guarantee reduces the command of household earnings by women, and, thereby, their well-being.
33494.zh_abstract: 我调查了针对印度农村家庭的就业保障对家庭内部劳动力和资源配置的后果。该保障为家庭收入提供了保险，取代了作为附加劳动者的女性，并消除了储蓄的动机。尽管项目工作参与率可观，但该保障减少了其他工作活动的参与，从而降低了已婚女性的劳动参与率及其丈夫的总工作时间。该保障解释了近期全国范围内农村女性劳动参与率下降的30%。尽管它增加了家庭消费，但该保障减少了女性对家庭收入的支配权，从而降低了她们的福祉。
33494.meta: Programs：CH, DEV, LS；JEL：I31, I32, J12, J13, O12, O15

33493.title: Optimal Spatial Policies
33493.abstract: We summarize recent methods to study optimal spatial policies. We center the discussion on policies that implement the optimal distribution of population in the presence of spatial spillovers, spatial transfers to optimally tackle redistribution between rich and poor regions, and optimal transportation investments.
33493.zh_abstract: 我们总结了研究最优空间政策的近期方法。我们将讨论集中在以下政策上：在存在空间溢出效应的情况下实施最优人口分布的政策、为在富裕和贫困地区之间最优地解决再分配问题的空间转移支付，以及最优交通投资。
33493.meta: Programs：ITI, LS, PE；JEL：H21, H23, R12, R13

33492.title: The Effect of Application Fees on Entry into Patenting
33492.zh_title: 申请费对专利进入的影响
33492.authors: Gaétan de Rassenfosse, Adam B. Jaffe
33492.abstract: Ensuring broad access to the patent system is crucial for fostering innovation and promoting economic growth. To support this goal, the U.S. Patent and Trademark Office offers reduced fees for small and micro entities. This paper investigates whether fee rates affect the filing of applications by small and micro entities. Exploiting recent fee reforms, the study evaluates the relationship between fee changes and the number of new entrants, controlling for potential confounding factors such as legislative changes. The findings suggest that fee reductions alone are insufficient to significantly increase participation in the patent system among small and micro entities.
33492.zh_abstract: 确保专利制度的广泛可及性对于促进创新和推动经济增长至关重要。为支持这一目标，美国专利商标局为小型和微型实体提供减费优惠。本文研究了费率是否影响小型和微型实体的申请提交。利用近期的费用改革，本研究评估了费用变化与新进入者数量之间的关系，并控制了诸如立法变化等潜在混淆因素。研究结果表明，仅靠减费不足以显著提高小型和微型实体对专利制度的参与度。

33491.title: Hot and Crowded: Temperature, Healthcare Utilization and Patient Outcomes
33491.zh_title: 炎热与拥挤：温度、医疗保健利用与患者结局
33491.authors: Sandra Aguilar-Gomez, Joshua S. Graff Zivin, Matthew J. Neidell
33491.abstract: Extreme heat raises emergency demand and may increase mortality through hospital congestion when shocks hit many people at once. Using administrative records from Mexico’s largest public health system, we separate direct heat effects from congestion spillovers. Days with maximum temperature above 34°C increase ED visits by 6.9 percent and hospitalizations by 4.2 percent, with sicker ED patients discharged home more often. In-hospital deaths rise for already-admitted patients, suggesting important spillover effects, and deaths disproportionately increase outside hospitals. These results identify health-system capacity as an important margin of adaptation to extreme heat.
33491.zh_abstract: 极端高温会增加急诊需求，并且当冲击同时影响许多人时，可能通过医院拥堵增加死亡率。利用墨西哥最大公共卫生系统的行政记录，我们将直接热效应与拥堵溢出效应区分开来。最高温度超过34°C的日子会使急诊就诊次数增加6.9%，住院人数增加4.2%，且病情更重的急诊患者更常被送回家。已入院患者的院内死亡人数增加，表明存在重要的溢出效应，而院外死亡人数则不成比例地增加。这些结果确定了卫生系统能力是适应极端高温的一个重要方面。
33491.meta: Programs：DEV, EEE, EH, PE；JEL：I15, I18, Q54

33490.title: Declining Life Satisfaction and Happiness Among Young Adults in Six English-speaking Countries
33490.zh_title: 六个英语国家年轻人生活满意度和幸福感的下降
33490.abstract: We report eleven studies that show declines in life satisfaction and happiness among young adults in the last decade or so, with less uniform trends among older adults. We found consistent evidence for this for the U.S. in the recent sweeps of several micro data sets including the Behavioral Risk Factor Survey, the General Social Survey, and the American National Election Survey. In the U. S. life satisfaction rises with age. This is broadly confirmed in several other datasets including four from the European Commission across five other English-speaking countries: Australia, Canada, Ireland New Zealand and the UK. Declining wellbeing of the young was also found in the World Values Survey, the Global Flourishing Study and Global Minds. There is broad evidence across all of these English-speaking countries that happiness and life satisfaction since 2020 rise with age. In several of these surveys we also find that ill-being declines in age. The U-shape in wellbeing by age that used to exist in these countries is now gone, replaced by a crisis in wellbeing among the young.
33490.zh_abstract: 我们报告了十一项研究，这些研究表明在过去十年左右，年轻人的生活满意度和幸福感有所下降，而老年人的趋势则不那么一致。我们在美国近期的几轮微观数据集中发现了这一点的持续证据，包括行为风险因素监测系统、综合社会调查和美国全国选举研究。在美国，生活满意度随年龄增长而上升。这在其他几个数据集中也得到了广泛证实，包括来自欧盟委员会的四个数据集，涵盖其他五个英语国家：澳大利亚、加拿大、爱尔兰、新西兰和英国。在世界价值观调查、全球繁荣研究和全球心智调查中也发现了年轻人幸福感的下降。有广泛证据表明，在所有英语国家中，自2020年以来，幸福感和生活满意度随年龄增长而上升。在其中几项调查中，我们还发现不良状态随年龄增长而下降。这些国家过去存在的幸福感随年龄的U型分布现已消失，取而代之的是年轻人中的幸福感危机。

33489.title: High-Speed Rail and China's Electric Vehicle Adoption Miracle
33489.zh_title: 高铁与中国电动汽车普及奇迹
33489.authors: Hanming Fang, Ming Li, Long Wang, Zoe Yang
33489.abstract: Using China's expansion of the high-speed rail system (HSR) as a quasi-natural experiment, we analyze the comprehensive vehicle registration data from 2010 to 2023 to estimate the causal impact of HSR connectivity on the adoption of electric vehicles (EVs). Implementing several identification strategies, including staggered difference-in-differences (DID), Callaway and Sant'Anna (CS) DID, and two instrumental-variable approaches, we consistently find that, by alleviating range anxiety, the expansion of HSR can account for up to one third of the increase in EV market share and EV sales in China during our sample period, with effects particularly pronounced in cities served by faster HSR lines. The results remain robust when controlling for local industrial policies, charging infrastructure growth, supply-side factors, and economic development. We also find that HSR connectivity amplifies the effectiveness of charging infrastructure and consumer purchase subsidies in promoting EV adoption.
33489.zh_abstract: 利用中国高铁系统的扩张作为准自然实验，我们分析了2010年至2023年的综合车辆登记数据，以估计高铁连通性对电动汽车普及的因果影响。通过实施多种识别策略，包括交错双重差分法、Callaway和Sant'Anna双重差分法以及两种工具变量方法，我们一致发现，通过缓解里程焦虑，高铁的扩张可以解释样本期间中国电动汽车市场份额和电动汽车销量增长的三分之一，其影响在高铁线路速度更快的城市尤为显著。在控制地方产业政策、充电基础设施增长、供给侧因素和经济发展后，结果依然稳健。我们还发现，高铁连通性增强了充电基础设施和消费者购买补贴在促进电动汽车普及方面的有效性。
33489.meta: Programs：DEV, EEE, PE；JEL：L52, L53, O18, Q55, R41

33488.title: Monetary Policy Under Okun’s Hypothesis
33488.zh_title: 奥肯定律下的货币政策
33488.abstract: The current monetary policy framework of the Fed intends to be more ’inclusive’ by running the economy hot for longer during expansions. The logic of this strategy rests on Okun’s (1973) hypothesis that sustaining a ‘high-pressure economy’ persistently improves labor market outcomes of low-wage workers. To evaluate this conjecture, we develop a Heterogeneous Agent New Keynesian framework with a three-state frictional model of the labor market where low-skilled workers are more exposed to the business cycle and recessions have a long-lasting effect on their labor force participation and earnings, in line with the evidence. Under a canonical Inflation Targeting rule, the ZLB generates a deflationary bias and severely amplifies the persistent scars of recessions at the bottom of the wage distribution. The Lower-for-Longer strategy is an effective antidote to the ZLB-driven hysteresis and leads to notable earnings gains for low-wage workers and a reduction to overall earnings inequality. If pursued aggressively, however, the policy reverts the inflation bias from negative to positive. Since policymakers might prioritize differently inflation relative to inclusion, we conclude by quantifying the inflation-inclusion trade-off implied by various monetary policy rules.
33488.zh_abstract: 美联储当前的货币政策框架旨在更具“包容性”，即在经济扩张期间让经济更长时间地保持过热。这一策略的逻辑基于奥肯（1973）的假设，即维持“高压经济”能够持续改善低工资工人的劳动力市场结果。为了评估这一猜想，我们构建了一个异质性代理人新凯恩斯框架，其中包含一个三状态摩擦性劳动力市场模型，在该模型中，低技能工人更容易受到商业周期的影响，且衰退对其劳动力参与率和收入有长期影响，这与证据一致。在标准的通胀目标制规则下，零利率下限会产生通缩偏差，并严重放大工资分布底层的持久衰退伤痕。“更长时间维持低利率”策略是零利率下限驱动滞后的有效解药，并导致低工资工人的收入显著增加，整体收入不平等程度降低。然而，如果该政策执行得过于激进，则会将通胀偏差从负值转为正值。由于政策制定者对通胀和包容性的优先顺序可能不同，我们最后通过量化各种货币政策规则所隐含的通胀-包容性权衡来得出结论。

33487.title: Economic Shocks and Healthcare Capital Investments
33487.zh_title: 经济冲击与医疗保健资本投资
33487.authors: Michael R. Richards, Maggie Shi, Christopher M. Whaley
33487.abstract: Information technology (IT) can enhance firms’ long-run performance but is also a risky investment, with high fixed costs and uncertain returns. Whether market events influence this tradeoff has received limited attention. We leverage the healthcare context to empirically examine hospitals’ IT investments following economic downturns and public insurance expansions––i.e., large industry shocks in opposite directions. We find novel and symmetrical responses. Recessions restrain investments while expansion policy indirectly stimulates them. Importantly, the IT margin is more elastic than other spending responses to market fluctuations. Supplementary analyses suggest that hospitals’ finances and perceptions of uncertainty drive these capital investment adjustments.
33487.zh_abstract: 信息技术可以提升企业的长期绩效，但也是一种高风险投资，具有高固定成本和不确定的回报。市场事件是否会影响这种权衡，此前受到的关注有限。我们利用医疗保健背景，实证研究了医院在经济衰退和公共保险扩张（即方向相反的重大行业冲击）后的信息技术投资。我们发现了新颖且对称的反应。经济衰退抑制了投资，而扩张政策则间接刺激了投资。重要的是，信息技术这一边际比其他支出对市场波动的反应更具弹性。补充分析表明，医院的财务状况和对不确定性的感知驱动了这些资本投资的调整。
33487.meta: Programs：EH；JEL：H42, I1, I11, I13, I18, L21, L23, L24

33486.title: Charting the Uncharted: The (Un)Intended Consequences of Oil Sanctions and Dark Shipping
33486.zh_title: 绘制未知领域：石油制裁与黑暗航运的（非）预期后果
33486.authors: Jesús Fernández-Villaverde, Yiliang Li, Le Xu, Francesco Zanetti
33486.abstract: We examine the rise of dark shipping – oil tankers disabling AIS transceivers to evade detection – amid Western sanctions on Iran, Syria, North Korea, Venezuela, and Russia. Using a machine learning-based ship clustering model, we track dark-shipped crude oil trade flows worldwide and detect unauthorized ship-to-ship transfers. From 2017 to 2023, dark ships transported an estimated 7.8 million metric tons of crude oil monthly – 43% of global seaborne crude exports – with China absorbing 15%. These sanctioned flows offset recorded declines in global oil exports but create distinct economic shifts. The U.S., a net oil exporter, faces lower oil prices but benefits from cheaper Chinese imports, driving deflationary growth. The EU, a net importer, contends with rising energy costs yet gains from Chinese demand, fueling inflationary expansion. China, leveraging discounted oil, boosts industrial output, propagating global economic shocks. Our findings expose dark shipping’s central role in reshaping oil markets and macroeconomic dynamics.
33486.zh_abstract: 我们研究了在西方对伊朗、叙利亚、朝鲜、委内瑞拉和俄罗斯实施制裁的背景下，黑暗航运（即油轮关闭自动识别系统收发器以逃避检测）的兴起。利用基于机器学习的船舶聚类模型，我们追踪了全球范围内通过黑暗航运运输的原油贸易流，并检测了未经授权的船对船转运。从2017年到2023年，黑暗船舶每月运输估计780万公吨原油——占全球海运原油出口的43%——其中中国吸收了15%。这些受制裁的流动抵消了全球石油出口记录在案的下降，但造成了独特的经济转变。作为净石油出口国的美国面临较低的油价，但受益于更便宜的中国进口，推动了通缩型增长。作为净进口国的欧盟面临能源成本上升，但得益于中国需求，助长了通胀型扩张。中国利用折扣石油提高了工业产出，向全球传播了经济冲击。我们的发现揭示了黑暗航运在重塑石油市场和宏观经济动态中的核心作用。

33485.title: Policy Interventions and China’s Stock Market in the Early Stages of the COVID-19 Pandemic
33485.zh_title: 新冠疫情初期政策干预与中国股市
33485.authors: Steven J. Davis, Dingqian Liu, Xuguang Simon Sheng, Yan Wang
33485.abstract: China’s stock market greatly outperformed other national markets during the first several months of the COVID-19 pandemic, and it did so even before it became evident that early containment efforts would flounder in the United States and many other countries. As to why, one view holds that aggressive monetary and credit easing propped up Chinese equity values. To assess this view, we consider several interventions that eased monetary and credit conditions in the first six months of 2020. Our analysis finds clear evidence that these interventions raised implied stock market volatility but little evidence that they influenced stock price levels. We also consider policy actions that restricted short selling, limited stock sales, and boosted stock purchases. These efforts to raise net equity demand were small in scale and highly time-limited, as we discuss, suggesting that any direct effects on stock prices were also modest. Neither our study nor other work known to us provides a ready explanation for the extraordinary performance of China’s stock market in the first half of 2020. This performance is even more striking in hindsight, given later developments in China’s economy and stock market.
33485.zh_abstract: 在新冠疫情最初几个月，中国股市的表现远超其他国家的市场，而且这种表现甚至在美国和许多其他国家的早期遏制努力明显失败之前就已出现。至于原因，一种观点认为，积极的货币和信贷宽松政策支撑了中国股票价值。为了评估这一观点，我们考虑了2020年前六个月放松货币和信贷条件的几项干预措施。我们的分析发现明确证据表明这些干预措施提高了隐含股票市场波动率，但几乎没有证据表明它们影响了股票价格水平。我们还考虑了限制卖空、限制股票出售和促进股票购买的政策行动。正如我们所讨论的，这些提高净股票需求的努力规模较小且高度有时间限制，表明对股票价格的任何直接影响也是温和的。我们的研究或我们所知的其他研究都没有为2020年上半年中国股市的非凡表现提供一个现成的解释。鉴于后来中国经济和股市的发展，这种表现事后看来更加引人注目。
33485.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, IFM, ME；JEL：E52, E58, E65, G12, G18

33484.title: The Welfare Benefits of Pay-As-You-Go Financing
33484.zh_title: 现收现付融资的福利收益
33484.authors: Paul Gertler, Brett Green, Renping Li, David Sraer
33484.abstract: Pay-as-you-go (PAYGo) financing is a novel contract that has recently become a popular form of credit, especially in low- and middle-income countries (LMICs). PAYGo financing relies on lockout technology that enables the lender to remotely disable the flow benefits of collateral when the borrower misses payments. This paper quantifies the welfare implications of PAYGo financing. We develop a dynamic structural model of consumers and estimate the model using a multi-arm, large scale pricing experiment conducted by a fintech lender that offers PAYGo financing for smartphones. We find that the welfare gains from access to PAYGo financing are equivalent to a 3.4% increase in income while remaining highly profitable for the lender. The welfare gains are larger for low-risk consumers and consumers in the middle of the income distribution. Under reasonable assumptions, PAYGo financing outperforms traditional secured loans for all but the riskiest consumers. We explore contract design and identify variations of the PAYGo contract that further improve welfare.
33484.zh_abstract: 现收现付（PAYGo）融资是一种新型合同，最近已成为一种流行的信贷形式，尤其是在低收入和中等收入国家（LMICs）。PAYGo 融资依赖于锁定技术，当借款人错过付款时，贷款人可以远程禁用抵押品的流动收益。本文量化了 PAYGo 融资的福利影响。我们构建了一个消费者动态结构模型，并使用一家为智能手机提供 PAYGo 融资的金融科技贷款机构进行的一项多臂大规模定价实验的数据来估计该模型。我们发现，获得 PAYGo 融资带来的福利收益相当于收入增加 3.4%，同时贷款机构仍能保持高盈利。对于低风险消费者和处于收入分配中段的消费者，福利收益更大。在合理假设下，除了风险最高的消费者外，PAYGo 融资的表现优于传统的担保贷款。我们探讨了合同设计，并确定了能够进一步改善福利的 PAYGo 合同变体。
33484.meta: Programs：CF, DEV, IO, PR；JEL：D14, D86, G21, G23

33483.title: Venture Capital Start-up Selection
33483.zh_title: 风险投资的初创企业筛选
33483.authors: Young Soo Jang, Steven N. Kaplan
33483.abstract: We study venture capital (VC) selection using the deal flow and investment decisions for more than 8,000 sourced deals from one early-stage VC in detail. The (unconditional) likelihood that a sourced start-up raises at least $\$1$ million in VC funding from some VC firm is roughly 30%. The deals the VC scored and invested in perform better than the deals the VC scored and did not invest which perform better than the deals the VC did not score, suggesting that the VC has selection ability. At the same time, the selection is noisy as only 32% (13%) of the invested firms have raised more than $\$10$ ($\$25$) million in VC funding. The VC evaluated the deals it scored on team, market, product and exit characteristics. Team is most successful at explaining VC funding of at least $\$1$ million, but does not explain larger financings or success. Market and product have more explanatory power for VC funding of more than $\$10,$ $\$25$ and $\$50$ million as well as longer term outcomes. Consistent with other recent work, this is consistent with VCs overweighting team in their initial investment decision.
33483.zh_abstract: 我们利用一家早期风险投资机构超过 8,000 个来源交易的交易流和投资决策，详细研究了风险投资（VC）的筛选过程。一个来源初创企业从某家风险投资机构获得至少 100 万美元风险投资的（无条件）概率约为 30%。该风险投资机构评分并投资的交易，其表现优于其评分但未投资的交易，而后者又优于该机构未评分的交易，这表明该风险投资机构具有筛选能力。同时，筛选过程存在噪音，因为只有 32%（13%）的投资企业获得了超过 1000 万美元（2500 万美元）的风险投资。该风险投资机构根据团队、市场、产品和退出特征对其评分的交易进行评估。团队特征在解释至少 100 万美元的风险投资方面最为成功，但不能解释更大规模的融资或成功。市场和产品特征对于解释超过 1000 万、2500 万和 5000 万美元的风险投资以及长期结果具有更强的解释力。与其他近期研究一致，这与风险投资机构在初始投资决策中过度看重团队特征的观点相符。

33482.title: The Price of Faith: Economic Costs and Religious Adaptation in Sub-Saharan Africa
33482.zh_title: 信仰的代价：撒哈拉以南非洲的经济成本与宗教适应
33482.authors: Eduardo Montero, Dean Yang, Triana Yentzen
33482.abstract: How do economic costs affect religious choices, and how do religious institutions adapt to economic realities? We study the Seventh-day Adventist (SDA) church in Sub-Saharan Africa, which prohibits production of tobacco, coffee, and tea, creating opportunity costs for potential members in areas suitable for these crops. We construct a measure of SDA membership opportunity cost that varies over time and space based on local crop suitability and export prices. Using church administrative data and member surveys, we find that increased opportunity costs lead to lower membership growth and lower satisfaction with the church among existing members. Higher opportunity costs also cause establishment of new SDA educational and health institutions; church members to perceive less messaging about “healthy living” religious tenets; and higher church member consumption of prohibited goods. These findings provide new insights into the microeconomics of cultural change, as mediated by religious institutions. Religious organizations can show striking flexibility in balancing tradition and adaptation when faced with economic pressures.
33482.zh_abstract: 经济成本如何影响宗教选择，宗教机构又如何适应经济现实？我们研究了撒哈拉以南非洲的基督复临安息日会（SDA），该教会禁止生产烟草、咖啡和茶叶，这为适合种植这些作物的地区的潜在成员带来了机会成本。我们构建了一个 SDA 成员机会成本的衡量指标，该指标根据当地作物适宜性和出口价格随时间与空间变化。利用教会行政数据和成员调查，我们发现机会成本的增加导致成员增长放缓，以及现有成员对教会的满意度降低。更高的机会成本还会导致建立新的 SDA 教育和医疗机构；教会成员感知到关于“健康生活”宗教教义的宣传减少；以及教会成员对违禁品的消费增加。这些发现为以宗教机构为中介的文化变迁的微观经济学提供了新的见解。面对经济压力时，宗教组织在平衡传统与适应方面可以表现出惊人的灵活性。

33481.title: Firm Trade Exposure, Labor Market Competition, and the Worker Incidence of Trade Shocks
33481.zh_title: 企业贸易暴露、劳动力市场竞争与贸易冲击的工人影响
33481.abstract: This paper examines how the composition of firm exposure and competition among imperfectly substitutable workers mediate the earnings, welfare, and unemployment incidence of changes in the international trade environment. We merge LEHD job match records with firm-level import and export records from the LFTTD and use them to estimate a large-scale assignment model of the entire U.S. labor market. The model flexibly accommodates frictions from switching regions, industries, trade engagement status, and even particular employers. We construct firm-level estimates of the employment impact of China's WTO entry using exogenous tariff gap variation via four different channels, import and export competition and import and export access, and combine them with the model to evaluate the shock's worker-level incidence. \nOur results show that the firm composition of shock exposure does matter for medium-run worker-level earnings incidence, with workers at the highly exposed multinational manufacturing firms experiencing the largest shock-induced earnings losses. However, labor market competition causes the shock's impact to spread to seemingly unaffected sectors and trickle down the skill ladder, so that entry-level non-traded service workers and initially unemployed job-seekers account for a large share of earnings losses and particularly unemployment increases.
33481.zh_abstract: 本文研究了企业暴露的构成以及不完全可替代工人之间的竞争如何调节国际贸易环境变化对收入、福利和失业的影响。我们将 LEHD 工作匹配记录与来自 LFTTD 的企业层面进出口记录合并，并用它们来估计一个覆盖整个美国劳动力市场的大规模分配模型。该模型灵活地容纳了来自转换地区、行业、贸易参与状态甚至特定雇主的摩擦。我们利用外生的关税差距变化，通过四种不同渠道——进口竞争、出口竞争、进口准入和出口准入——构建了企业层面关于中国加入 WTO 对就业影响的估计，并将其与模型结合以评估该冲击对工人层面的影响。
33481.meta: Programs：ITI, LS；JEL：F15, F16, F6, J23, J6, J62

33480.title: Cross-Gender Social Ties Around the World
33480.zh_title: 全球范围内的跨性别社会关系
33480.authors: Michael Bailey, Drew M. Johnston, Theresa Kuchler, Ayush Kumar, Johannes Stroebel
33480.abstract: We introduce, analyze, and describe subnational data on cross-gender friendships for nearly 200 countries and territories, using data from 1.38 trillion ties between 1.8 billion Facebook users. Homophily by gender exists nearly everywhere, with individuals' strongest ties exhibiting less homophily than their peripheral connections. Across countries, cross-gender friendship rates align with existing measures of gender disparities. Within countries, cross-gender friending rates correlate with support for gender equality. In the US, cross-gender friendships are rarer in areas with a larger White share of the population, higher incomes, and more per-capita religious congregations.
33480.zh_abstract: 我们介绍、分析并描述了近 200 个国家和地区的跨性别友谊的次国家级数据，使用了来自 18 亿 Facebook 用户之间 1.38 万亿条关系的数据。性别同质性几乎无处不在，个体最强的关系表现出的同质性低于其外围联系。在国家之间，跨性别友谊率与现有的性别差距衡量指标相一致。在国家内部，跨性别交友率与对性别平等的支持度相关。在美国，跨性别友谊在白人人口比例较大、收入较高以及人均宗教会众较多的地区更为罕见。
33480.meta: Programs：CH, DAE, DEV, ED, EH, LS, PE, POL；JEL：H0, R0

33479.title: The Minimum Wage, Turnover, and the Shape of the Wage Distribution
33479.zh_title: 最低工资、人员流动与工资分布形态
33479.authors: Pierre R. Brochu, David A. Green, Thomas Lemieux, James H. Townsend
33479.abstract: This paper proposes an empirical approach to decompose the distributional effects of minimum wages into effects for workers moving out of employment, workers moving into employment, and workers continuing in employment. We estimate the effects of the minimum wage on the hazard rate for wages, which provides a convenient way of re-scaling the wage distribution to control for possible employment effects. We find that minimum wage increases do not result in an abnormal concentration of Job Leavers below the new minimum wage, which is inconsistent with employment effects predicted by a neoclassical model. We also find that, for Job Stayers, the spike and spillover effects of the minimum wage are simply shifted right to the new minimum wage. Our findings are consistent with a model where entry wages are set according to a job ladder, and where firms anchor their internal wage structure on the minimum wage due to fairness or internal incentives issues.
33479.zh_abstract: 本文提出了一种实证方法，将最低工资的分配效应分解为对退出就业的工人、进入就业的工人以及继续就业的工人的影响。我们估计了最低工资对工资风险率的影响，这提供了一种方便的方法来重新调整工资分布，以控制可能的就业效应。我们发现，最低工资的提高并未导致低于新最低工资的离职者异常集中，这与新古典模型预测的就业效应不一致。我们还发现，对于留任者而言，最低工资的峰值和溢出效应只是简单地右移至新的最低工资。我们的发现与一个模型一致，在该模型中，入职工资是根据工作阶梯设定的，并且由于公平或内部激励问题，企业将其内部工资结构锚定在最低工资上。

33478.title: Micro and Macro Cost-Price Dynamics in Normal Times and During Inflation Surges
33478.zh_title: 正常时期与通胀飙升期间的微观和宏观成本-价格动态
33478.authors: Luca Gagliardone, Mark Gertler, Simone Lenzu, Joris Tielens
33478.abstract: We develop a unified approach to studying cost-price dynamics in the cross-section of firms in order to jointly explain the time series of aggregate inflation and the frequency of price changes, both during normal times and inflation surges. A key novelty is the use of microdata on firms’ prices and production costs to construct an empirical measure of price gaps—the deviation between a firm’s listed and optimal price. Conditional on the path of aggregate cost shocks extracted from the data, a state-dependent pricing model with strategic complementarities accounts well for both the linear cost-price dynamics of the pre-pandemic period and the nonlinear increase in inflation and frequency of price adjustment that followed.
33478.zh_abstract: 我们开发了一种统一的方法来研究企业横截面上的成本-价格动态，以共同解释总体通胀率和价格调整频率的时间序列，无论是在正常时期还是通胀飙升期间。一个关键的新颖之处在于，我们利用企业价格和生产成本的微观数据来构建一个价格缺口的实证衡量指标——即企业标价与最优价格之间的偏差。以从数据中提取的总体成本冲击路径为条件，一个具有战略互补性的状态依赖定价模型很好地解释了疫情前时期的线性成本-价格动态，以及随后出现的通胀率和价格调整频率的非线性增长。

33477.title: Trading in Twilight: Sleep, Mental Alertness, and Stock Market Trading
33477.zh_title: 在暮色中交易：睡眠、精神警觉性与股票市场交易
33477.authors: Hee Seo Han, David Hirshleifer, Jinfei Sheng, Zheng Sun
33477.abstract: We test whether mental alertness, as proxied by sleep disruption, impairs investor trading performance. Using four complementary approaches, we document that retail investors who experience a later sunset time on average earn lower abnormal returns on their trades. These approaches include panel regression with household fixed effects, RDD based on time zone borders, comparison of different seasons and latitudes, and daylight saving changes. Further tests suggest that the sleep disruption effect derives from impaired investor attention.
33477.zh_abstract: 我们检验了精神警觉性（以睡眠中断为代理变量）是否会损害投资者的交易表现。通过四种互补的方法，我们记录了经历较晚日落时间的散户投资者在其交易中平均获得较低的超额收益。这些方法包括包含家庭固定效应的面板回归、基于时区边界的断点回归设计、不同季节和纬度的比较，以及夏令时变化。进一步的检验表明，睡眠中断的影响源于投资者注意力的受损。
33477.meta: Programs：AP；JEL：D03, D91, G11, G12, G4, G40, G41, G5, G50

33476.title: How Costly Are Business Cycle Volatility and Inflation? A Vox Populi Approach
33476.zh_title: 经济周期波动与通胀的代价有多高？一种“民意”方法
33476.authors: Dimitris Georgarakos, Kwang Hwan Kim, Olivier Coibion, Myungkyu Shim, Myunghwan Andrew Lee, Yuriy Gorodnichenko, Geoff Kenny, Seowoo Han, Michael Weber
33476.abstract: Using repeated surveys of households across thirteen countries, we study how much individuals would be willing to pay to eliminate business cycles. These direct estimates are much higher than traditional measures following Lucas (2003): on average, households would be prepared to sacrifice ≈6% of their lifetime consumption to eliminate business cycle fluctuations. A similar result holds for inflation: to bring inflation to their desired rate, individuals would be willing to sacrifice ≈5% of their consumption. Willingness to pay to eliminate business cycles and inflation is generally higher for those whose consumption is more pro-cyclical, those who are more uncertain about the economic outlook, and those who live in countries with greater historical volatility.
33476.zh_abstract: 利用对十三个国家家庭的重复调查，我们研究了个体愿意为消除经济周期支付多少。这些直接估计值远高于 Lucas (2003) 之后的传统衡量指标：平均而言，家庭愿意牺牲其一生消费的约 6% 来消除经济周期波动。通胀也得出了类似的结果：为了将通胀降至其期望水平，个体愿意牺牲其约 5% 的消费。对于那些消费更具顺周期性、对经济前景更不确定以及生活在历史波动性更大国家的人来说，为消除经济周期和通胀而支付的意愿通常更高。

33475.title: The Mental Health of the Young in Asia and the Middle East: The Importance of Self-Reports
33475.zh_title: 亚洲和中东地区年轻人的心理健康：自我报告的重要性
33475.abstract: We examine the age profile of subjective wellbeing and illbeing in nine Asian countries (Bangladesh, Hong Kong, India, Indonesia, Japan, Pakistan, Philippines, Singapore, Sri Lanka) and seven Middle Eastern countries (Iraq, Israel, Jordan, Turkey, Saudi Arabia, the UAE and Yemen). We find the relationship between age and reported wellbeing differs according to the way the survey is conducted. In the Gallup World Poll, where the data are collected by interviewers face-to-face or by telephone (computer-aided telephone interviews, or CATI) the young are the happiest and the results are the same across the two survey modes. We find the same result in CATI surveys in the Global Flourishing Survey (GFS) of 2022-2024 in 7 Asian and Middle Eastern (AME) countries. However, when the GFS survey is conducted on the web (computer-aided web interview, or CAWI) wellbeing is u-shaped in age, and is highest among the oldest respondents. If we turn to negative affect measures (loneliness, anxiety, depression, worry) these rise with age using CATI but fall with age using CAWI. We look for survey mode switching in the age coefficient across 40 outcomes. In general, the switch is confined to subjective wellbeing and illbeing metrics. Switching does not occur when respondents are asked about their physical health, bodily pain, unemployment status, drinking and smoking, or personality-related questions. It appears that the mode effect is largely confined to how individuals rate their subjective wellbeing and illbeing. The results are suggestive of social desirability response bias which leads young people to under-report socially undesirable affective states to interviewers.
33475.zh_abstract: 我们考察了九个亚洲国家（孟加拉国、香港、印度、印度尼西亚、日本、巴基斯坦、菲律宾、新加坡、斯里兰卡）和七个中东国家（伊拉克、以色列、约旦、土耳其、沙特阿拉伯、阿联酋和也门）主观幸福感和不幸福感的年龄分布。我们发现，年龄与报告幸福感之间的关系因调查实施方式而异。在盖洛普世界民意调查中，数据通过访员面对面或电话（计算机辅助电话访谈，CATI）收集，年轻人最幸福，且两种调查模式的结果相同。我们在 2022-2024 年对 7 个亚洲和中东国家进行的全球繁荣调查（GFS）的 CATI 调查中发现了相同的结果。然而，当 GFS 调查通过网络（计算机辅助网络访谈，CAWI）进行时，幸福感呈 U 型年龄分布，且在年龄最大的受访者中最高。如果我们转向负面情感指标（孤独、焦虑、抑郁、担忧），这些指标在使用 CATI 时随年龄增长而上升，但在使用 CAWI 时随年龄增长而下降。我们考察了 40 个结果中年龄系数的调查模式转换。总体而言，这种转换仅限于主观幸福感和不幸福感指标。当受访者被问及他们的身体健康、身体疼痛、失业状况、饮酒和吸烟或与性格相关的问题时，不会发生转换。看来，模式效应主要局限于个体如何评价其主观幸福感和不幸福感。这些结果暗示了社会期望反应偏差，导致年轻人向访员少报社会不期望的情感状态。

33474.title: Misspecification-Robust Shrinkage and Selection for VAR Forecasts and IRFs
33474.zh_title: 针对 VAR 预测和脉冲响应函数的误设稳健收缩与选择
33474.abstract: VARs are often estimated with Bayesian techniques to cope with model dimensionality. The posterior means define a class of shrinkage estimators, indexed by hyperparameters that determine the relative weight on maximum likelihood estimates and prior means. In a Bayesian setting, it is natural to choose these hyperparameters by maximizing the marginal data density. However, this is undesirable if the VAR is misspecified. In this paper, we derive asymptotically unbiased estimates of the multi-step forecasting risk and the impulse response estimation risk to determine hyperparameters in settings where the VAR is (potentially) misspecified. The proposed criteria can be used to jointly select the optimal shrinkage hyperparameter, VAR lag length, and to choose among different types of multi-step-ahead predictors; or among IRF estimates based on VARs and local projections. The selection approach is illustrated in a Monte Carlo study and an empirical application.
33474.zh_abstract: VAR 模型通常使用贝叶斯技术进行估计以应对模型维度。后验均值定义了一类收缩估计量，由决定最大似然估计和先验均值相对权重的超参数索引。在贝叶斯设定中，通过最大化边际数据密度来选择这些超参数是自然的。然而，如果 VAR 模型是误设的，这并不可取。在本文中，我们推导了多步预测风险和脉冲响应估计风险的渐近无偏估计，以在 VAR 模型（可能）误设的设定中确定超参数。所提出的准则可用于联合选择最优收缩超参数、VAR 滞后长度，以及在不同类型的多步预测器之间进行选择；或在基于 VAR 和局部投影的 IRF 估计之间进行选择。该选择方法通过蒙特卡洛研究和实证应用进行了说明。

33473.title: Understanding the Role of Genetic Heterogeneity in Smoking Interventions: Experimental Evidence from the Lung Health Study
33473.zh_title: 理解吸烟干预中遗传异质性的作用：来自肺健康研究的实验证据
33473.authors: Shubhashrita Basu, Jason Fletcher, Qiongshi Lu, Jiacheng Miao, Lauren L. Schmitz
33473.abstract: We examine whether genome-wide summary measures of genetic risk known as polygenic indices (PGIs) provide new insights into the efficacy of the Lung Health Study (LHS)–a large, randomized controlled trial (RCT) that evaluated the effect of a smoking cessation intervention program on cessation maintenance and lung function. Results indicate that the intervention was less successful for participants with higher PGIs for smoking initiation and intensity. Given the increasing availability and affordability of genomic data, we argue that in the context of RCTs, PGIs can further our understanding of heterogeneous treatment effects and the mechanisms that may be driving them.
33473.zh_abstract: 我们考察了被称为多基因指数（PGIs）的全基因组遗传风险汇总指标是否为理解肺健康研究（LHS）的效果提供了新见解。LHS 是一项大型随机对照试验（RCT），评估了戒烟干预项目对戒烟维持和肺功能的影响。结果表明，对于吸烟起始和强度 PGI 较高的参与者，干预效果较差。鉴于基因组数据的可用性和可负担性日益增加，我们认为在 RCT 的背景下，PGIs 可以加深我们对异质性处理效应及其可能驱动机制的理解。

33472.title: Bank Debt, Mutual Fund Equity, and Swing Pricing in Liquidity Provision
33472.zh_title: 银行债务、共同基金股权与流动性供给中的摆动定价
33472.authors: Yiming Ma, Kairong Xiao, Yao Zeng
33472.abstract: Liquidity provision is often attributed to debt-issuing intermediaries like banks. We develop a unified theoretical framework and empirically show that mutual funds issuing demandable equity also provide an economically significant amount of liquidity by insuring against idiosyncratic liquidity shocks. Quantitatively, bond funds provide 12.5% of the liquidity that banks provide per dollar. Our model further shows that when equity values incorporate the liquidation cost from redemptions, as in swing pricing, liquidity provision is not necessarily reduced. This is because swing pricing may increase funds' capacity for holding illiquid assets without inducing panic runs.
33472.zh_abstract: 流动性供给通常归因于像银行这样发行债务的中介机构。我们发展了一个统一的理论框架，并通过实证表明，发行活期股权的共同基金也通过为异质性流动性冲击提供保险，提供了经济意义上显著的流动性。从数量上看，每美元债券基金提供的流动性是银行提供的 12.5%。我们的模型进一步表明，当股权价值包含赎回的清算成本时（如摆动定价），流动性供给不一定减少。这是因为摆动定价可能提高基金持有非流动性资产的能力，而不会引发恐慌性赎回。

33471.title: If We Build It, We Will Come: Institution Development in Academia and the Evolution of Career Choices by Top Talent During Japan’s Industrialization
33471.zh_title: 如果我们建设它，我们就会来：日本工业化过程中学术界的制度发展与顶尖人才职业选择的演变
33471.authors: Takuya Hiraiwa, Serguey Braguinsky, Rajshree Agarwal
33471.abstract: Modern economies rely on academia as a critical complement to industry in generating new knowledge, and training future scientific and engineering talent that fuels endogenous growth. Academia’s ability to perform this role, however, depends on recruiting and retaining talented faculty who often have lucrative alternative options in industry. Complementing existing literature focusing on factors in mature scientific labor markets, we study how this was addressed endogenously during Japan’s industrialization as academic and industrial institutions were still being formed. Combining historical analysis with a dynamic occupational choice model, we utilize unique data on the census of university-educated engineers from the first forty cohorts following the establishment of higher technical education in Japan. The historical analysis shows that incumbent faculty reshaped academic governance, redefined professional purpose towards research, and created research institutes as new organizational forms. Using causal evidence from the Institute of Aeronautics and structural estimation of career choices, we find that these institutional changes increased the non-pecuniary attractiveness of academic careers, allowing universities to keep attracting a disproportionate share of top talent despite a widening pay gap with industry. The findings demonstrate how non-pecuniary incentives emerge through institution building and how this reshapes organizational responses across academia, industry and state.
33471.zh_abstract: 现代经济依赖学术界作为产业界的关键补充，以产生新知识，并培养推动内生增长所需的未来科学和工程人才。然而，学术界履行这一角色的能力取决于招募和留住有才华的教师，而这些教师通常在产业界拥有利润丰厚的替代选择。作为对关注成熟科学劳动力市场因素的现有文献的补充，我们研究了在日本工业化过程中，当学术和产业机构仍在形成时，这一问题是如何内生地解决的。结合历史分析与动态职业选择模型，我们利用了日本高等技术教育建立后前四十个队列中受过大学教育的工程师普查的独特数据。历史分析表明，在职教师重塑了学术治理，将职业目标重新定义为研究，并创建了研究所作为新的组织形式。利用来自航空研究所的因果证据和职业选择的结构性估计，我们发现这些制度变化增加了学术职业的非金钱吸引力，使得大学能够持续吸引不成比例的顶尖人才，尽管与产业界的薪酬差距在扩大。研究结果展示了非金钱激励如何通过制度建设产生，以及这如何重塑学术界、产业界和国家层面的组织响应。

33470.title: An Alpha in Affordable Housing?
33470.zh_title: 经济适用房中的阿尔法？
33470.authors: Sven Damen, Matthijs Korevaar, Stijn Van Nieuwerburgh
33470.abstract: Residential properties with the lowest rent levels provide the highest investment returns to their owners. Using detailed rent, cost, and price data from the United States, Belgium, and The Netherlands, we show that this phenomenon holds across housing markets and time. If anything, low-rent units hedge business cycle risk. We also find no evidence for differential regulatory risk exposure. We document segmentation of investors, with large corporate landlords shying away from the low-tier segment possibly for reputational reasons. Financial constraints prevent renters from purchasing their property and medium-sized landlords from scaling up, sustaining excess risk-adjusted returns. Low-income tenants ultimately pay the price for this segmentation in the form of a high rent burden.
33470.zh_abstract: 租金水平最低的住宅物业为其所有者提供了最高的投资回报。利用来自美国、比利时和荷兰的详细租金、成本和价格数据，我们表明这一现象在不同住房市场和时期均成立。低租金单元甚至对冲了经济周期风险。我们也没有发现差异化监管风险敞口的证据。我们记录了投资者的分割，大型企业房东可能出于声誉原因回避低端市场。财务约束阻止了租户购买其房产以及中型房东扩大规模，从而维持了超额的风险调整后回报。低收入租户最终以高租金负担的形式为这种分割付出了代价。
33470.meta: Programs：AP, CF, ME；JEL：G1, G23, G5, R20, R31

33469.title: The Labor Market Impact of Digital Technologies
33469.zh_title: 数字技术对劳动力市场的影响
33469.abstract: We investigate the impact of digital technology on employment patterns in Korea, where firms have rapidly adopted digital technologies such as artificial intelligence (AI), big data, and the internet of things (IoT). By exploiting regional variations in technology exposure, we find significant negative effects on high-skill and female workers, particularly those in non-IT (information technology) services. This contrasts with previous technological disruptions, such as the IT revolution and robotization, which primarily affected low-skill male workers in manufacturing. In IT services, although high-skill employment declined, vacancy postings for high-skill workers increased, implying a shift in labor demand toward newer skill sets. These findings highlight both the labor displacement and the new opportunities generated by digital transformation.
33469.zh_abstract: 我们研究了数字技术对韩国就业模式的影响，在韩国，企业迅速采用了人工智能（AI）、大数据和物联网（IoT）等数字技术。通过利用技术暴露的区域差异，我们发现对高技能和女性工人，特别是那些在非IT（信息技术）服务行业的工人，产生了显著的负面影响。这与之前的技术颠覆（如IT革命和机器人化）形成对比，后者主要影响制造业中的低技能男性工人。在IT服务行业，尽管高技能就业下降，但针对高技能工人的职位发布却增加了，这意味着劳动力需求正在向更新的技能组合转变。这些发现突显了数字转型带来的劳动力替代和新的机遇。

33468.title: Dodging Day Zero: Drought, Adaptation, and Inequality in Cape Town
33468.zh_title: 躲避“归零日”：开普敦的干旱、适应与不平等
33468.authors: Alexander C. Abajian, Cassandra Cole, Kelsey Jack, Kyle C. Meng, Martine Visser
33468.abstract: A near-catastrophic drought in Cape Town, South Africa illustrates three general implications of climate change for publicly-provided utility services. First, to reduce aggregate water demand, the public utility increased prices, leading to large demand reductions by richer households. Prior to the drought they use twice the public piped water of poorer households. At the peak of the drought, they use less. Second, some of the differential demand reduction comes from richer households substituting away from public water toward privately financed groundwater. This private adaptation both lowers the public utility's total revenue and shifts costs onto poorer households, consequences that persist after the drought abates. Third, policy interventions mitigate some of the fiscal and distributional impacts of private adaptation. These findings highlight how climate adaptation, in the context of publicly provided goods and services, can create pecuniary and environmental externalities with equity consequences.
33468.zh_abstract: 南非开普敦一场近乎灾难性的干旱，说明了气候变化对公共事业服务的三个普遍影响。首先，为减少总用水需求，公共事业单位提高了水价，导致较富裕家庭大幅减少用水。在干旱之前，他们使用的公共管道水量是较贫困家庭的两倍。在干旱高峰期，他们的用水量反而更少。其次，部分差异化的需求减少源于富裕家庭从使用公共供水转向使用私人资助的地下水。这种私人适应行为既降低了公共事业单位的总收入，又将成本转嫁给了较贫困家庭，这些后果在干旱缓解后依然持续存在。第三，政策干预减轻了私人适应行为的部分财政和分配影响。这些发现凸显了在公共物品和服务的背景下，气候适应如何可能产生具有公平后果的金钱和环境外部性。
33468.meta: Programs：DEV, EEE, PE；JEL：H42, O13, Q25, Q54

33467.title: Labor Market Monopsony: Fundamentals and Frontiers
33467.zh_title: 劳动力市场买方垄断：基础与前沿
33467.abstract: This chapter reviews the theory of monopsonistic wage setting, its empirical implications, and some puzzles the framework has struggled to explain. We begin by examining the fundamentals of monopsonistic wage determination. The core of the theory is a mapping from the distribution of worker outside options to wages. We study non-parametric shape restrictions that ensure this mapping is unique. Building on these results, we introduce a menu of tractable parametrizations of labor supply to the firm, some of which are shown to emerge naturally from equilibrium search models. Next, we review why wage markdowns do not necessarily signal inefficiency and discuss some criteria for assessing misallocation in a monopsony model with search frictions. Turning to the model’s empirical implications, we examine how the magnitude of productivity-wage passthrough depends on the super-elasticity of labor supply to the firm and establish that compensating differentials for firm amenities depend on the curvature of the outside option distribution. We show that firm-specific shifts in either productivity or amenities can be used as instruments to identify labor supply elasticities and review strategies for estimating non-constant elasticities. We then consider extensions of the basic model involving third-degree wage discrimination and examine their ability to rationalize patterns of worker-firm sorting. Monopsony models traditionally assume that firms commit to posted wages. Relaxing this assumption, we develop a connection between the first-order conditions of the monopsony model and models of bargaining with incomplete information. These models explain why bilateral inefficiencies may persist in the presence of negotiation, yield predictions about the response of within-firm wage dispersion to productivity shocks, and suggest reasons why some productivity shifters may not constitute excludable instruments. Next, we endogenize productivity by allowing for efficiency wages, non-constant returns to scale, and price-cost markups. Empirical monopsony estimates often suggest that firms enjoy implausibly large profit margins. We argue that allowing for non-constant labor supply elasticities and firm adjustment costs can potentially resolve this difficulty. Finally, we review why the strong passthrough of minimum wages to product prices presents a challenging puzzle for standard monopsony models and discuss potential reconciliations to this puzzle involving firm heterogeneity, quality upgrading, and lumpy price adjustment.
33467.zh_abstract: 本章回顾了买方垄断工资决定理论、其经验含义以及该框架难以解释的一些谜题。我们首先考察买方垄断工资决定的基础。该理论的核心是从工人外部选择分布到工资的映射。我们研究了确保这种映射唯一性的非参数形状约束。在这些结果的基础上，我们引入了一系列易于处理的、关于企业劳动力供给的参数化方法，其中一些方法被证明会自然地从均衡搜寻模型中产生。接下来，我们回顾了为什么工资折扣并不一定意味着无效率，并讨论了在具有搜寻摩擦的买方垄断模型中评估资源错配的一些标准。转向模型的经验含义，我们考察了生产率-工资传导的幅度如何取决于企业劳动力供给的超弹性，并确定了企业便利设施的补偿性差异取决于外部选择分布的曲率。我们表明，生产率或便利设施的企业特定变化可以用作识别劳动力供给弹性的工具，并回顾了估计非常数弹性的策略。然后，我们考虑了涉及三级价格歧视的基本模型的扩展，并考察了它们合理化工人-企业分类模式的能力。买方垄断模型传统上假设企业承诺公布工资。放宽这一假设，我们建立了买方垄断模型的一阶条件与不完全信息谈判模型之间的联系。这些模型解释了为什么在谈判存在的情况下双边无效率可能持续存在，产生了关于企业内部工资分散度对生产率冲击反应的预测，并指出了为什么某些生产率变动因素可能不构成可排除工具的原因。接下来，我们通过允许效率工资、非恒定规模报酬和价格成本加成来内生化生产率。经验性的买方垄断估计通常表明企业享有高得令人难以置信的利润率。我们认为，允许非恒定的劳动力供给弹性和企业调整成本可能解决这一难题。最后，我们回顾了为什么最低工资对产品价格的强传导对标准买方垄断模型构成了一个具有挑战性的谜题，并讨论了涉及企业异质性、质量升级和价格调整粘性的潜在解决方案。

33466.title: A Cognitive Theory of Reasoning and Choice
33466.zh_title: 推理与选择的认知理论
33466.authors: Pedro Bordalo, Nicola Gennaioli, Giacomo Lanzani, Andrei Shleifer
33466.abstract: We present a theory of decisions in which attention to the features of choice options is determined by the decision maker's categorization of the current choice problem in a set of problems she solved in the past. Categorization depends on goal-relevant as well as contextual problem-level features. The model yields systematic heterogeneity in attention and choice in a given problem based on different past experiences, rigidity of choices when categorization does not change despite new data, and discontinuous shifts when changes in bottom-up salient features cause re-categorization. The model unifies major puzzles and framing effects in riskless, statistical, and lottery choice based on heterogenous and unstable mental representations.
33466.zh_abstract: 我们提出一个决策理论，其中对选择选项特征的关注由决策者将当前选择问题归类到她过去解决过的一组问题中的方式决定。分类取决于与目标相关的以及情境性的问题层面特征。该模型基于不同的过往经验，在给定问题中产生了注意力和选择的系统性异质性；当分类在新数据面前不改变时，选择具有刚性；当自下而上的显著特征变化导致重新分类时，则产生不连续的转变。该模型基于异质且不稳定的心理表征，统一了无风险选择、统计选择和彩票选择中的主要谜题和框架效应。

33465.title: The Effect of US COVID-19 Excess Mortality on Social Security Outlays
33465.zh_title: 美国COVID-19超额死亡率对社会安全支出的影响
33465.authors: Hanke Heun-Johnson, Darius Lakdawalla, Julian Reif, Bryan Tysinger
33465.abstract: The COVID-19 pandemic has resulted in significant direct and indirect excess mortality among the US population, impacting the future outlays of the US Social Security Administration (SSA) Old Age, Survivors, and Disability Insurance (OASDI) program. This study aimed to estimate the net effects of pandemic-induced excess deaths on OASDI liabilities, utilizing dynamic microsimulation models, and examined how these effects vary across different socioeconomic and racial-ethnic groups. Data on excess deaths were obtained from the CDC and processed to account for seasonal variations and demographic disparities. The simulation incorporated demographic and health status variables to project OASDI retirement and disability benefits, and survivors’ benefits for spouses and children, for respondents with highest COVID mortality risk. The pandemic resulted in approximately 1.4 million excess deaths among individuals aged 25 and older between 2020 and 2023. These premature deaths mostly reduced future retirement benefits, which increased the Social Security fund by $\$219$ billion. Future disability benefit payments were reduced by $\$6$ billion. However, these gains were partly offset by reductions in future payroll tax flows ($\$44$ billion) and increased payments to surviving spouses and children ($\$25$ billion), resulting in a net impact of $\$156$ billion. Non-Hispanic Black and Hispanic decedents left behind more underage children per capita, yet payments to their surviving family members were lower compared to non-Hispanic White decedents, across all educational levels. Excess mortality during the COVID-19 pandemic has complex implications for the OASDI program. While there is an estimated net positive financial impact due to reduced future retirement benefits, this effect is mitigated by decreased payroll tax contributions and increased survivors’ benefits. The differential impact by race and ethnicity highlights existing inequalities and underscores the importance of considering demographic disparities in future projections of Social Security liabilities. These findings provide critical insights for informing SSA trust fund projections and policy decisions.
33465.zh_abstract: COVID-19大流行导致美国人口出现显著的直接和间接超额死亡，影响了美国社会安全局（SSA）的老年、遗属和残疾保险（OASDI）项目的未来支出。本研究旨在利用动态微观模拟模型，估计大流行导致的超额死亡对OASDI负债的净影响，并考察这些影响在不同社会经济和种族-民族群体间的差异。超额死亡数据来自CDC，并经过处理以考虑季节性变化和人口统计差异。模拟纳入了人口统计和健康状况变量，以预测COVID-19死亡风险最高受访者的OASDI退休和残疾福利，以及配偶和子女的遗属福利。大流行导致2020年至2023年间25岁及以上个体中约140万例超额死亡。这些过早死亡大多减少了未来的退休福利，使社会安全基金增加了2190亿美元。未来的残疾福利支付减少了60亿美元。然而，这些收益部分被未来工资税流的减少（440亿美元）和对幸存配偶及子女支付的增加（250亿美元）所抵消，净影响为1560亿美元。非西班牙裔黑人和西班牙裔逝者留下的未成年子女数量人均更多，但与其幸存家庭成员获得的支付相比，在所有教育水平上均低于非西班牙裔白人逝者。COVID-19大流行期间的超额死亡对OASDI项目具有复杂的影响。虽然由于未来退休福利的减少，估计会产生正的净财务影响，但这种影响被工资税贡献的减少和遗属福利的增加所削弱。按种族和民族划分的差异化影响凸显了现有的不平等，并强调了在未来的社会安全负债预测中考虑人口统计差异的重要性。这些发现为告知SSA信托基金预测和政策决策提供了关键见解。

33499.title: Measuring the Average Period of Production
33499.abstract: The importance of time in production was emphasized by Classical economists and was at the core of the Austrian capital theory proposed by Böhm-Bawerk and further elaborated by Wicksell, Hicks, Dorfman, and many others. A central concept in this literature is the existence of an ‘average period of production’ which governs the demand for circulating capital associated with a production process. Building on Böhm-Bawerk (1889), we propose a measure of the average period of production as a (weighted) average temporal distance between the time at which a firm employs its inputs and the time at which these inputs deliver finished goods that are sold to consumers. We show that, under stationarity conditions, this measure corresponds to the ratio of a firm’s stock of inventories to the cost of the goods it sells in a given period. Using data from publicly traded companies worldwide, we compute and validate this measure for various industries and countries, and show that, consistent with theory, this measure is lower, the higher the cost of capital faced by firms is.
33499.zh_abstract: 时间在生产中的重要性被古典经济学家所强调，并且是Böhm-Bawerk提出、后经Wicksell、Hicks、Dorfman等人进一步阐述的奥地利资本理论的核心。该文献中的一个核心概念是存在一个“平均生产周期”，它支配着与生产过程相关的流动资本需求。基于Böhm-Bawerk (1889)，我们提出了一种衡量平均生产周期的方法，将其定义为（加权）平均时间距离，即企业投入其要素的时间与这些要素交付给消费者的成品时间之间的平均时间距离。我们证明，在稳态条件下，该衡量指标对应于企业给定时期内的存货存量与其销售商品成本之比。利用全球上市公司的数据，我们计算并验证了不同行业和国家的这一指标，并表明，与理论一致，企业面临的资本成本越高，该指标越低。

33498.title: The Benefits from Bundling Demand in K-12 Broadband Procurement
33498.zh_title: K-12宽带采购中捆绑需求的收益
33498.authors: Gaurab Aryal, Charles Murry, Pallavi Pal, Arnab Palit
33498.abstract: We study a new market design for K-12 school broadband procurement that switched from school-specific bidding to a system that bundled schools into groups. Using an event study approach, we estimate the program reduced internet prices by 37% per Mbps per month while increasing bandwidth by 500%. These benefits occurred by mitigating exposure risk in broadband procurement – the risk that providers win too few contracts to cover fixed infrastructure costs. Using a bounds approach, we show robustness of our estimates and document that participants saved at least as much as their federal subsidies and experienced substantial welfare gains.
33498.zh_abstract: 我们研究了一种新的K-12学校宽带采购市场设计，该设计从学校特定投标转变为将学校捆绑成组的系统。使用事件研究方法，我们估计该计划使每Mbps每月的互联网价格降低了37%，同时带宽增加了500%。这些收益是通过减轻宽带采购中的暴露风险——即供应商赢得太少合同而无法覆盖固定基础设施成本的风险——来实现的。使用边界方法，我们展示了估计结果的稳健性，并记录了参与者至少节省了相当于其联邦补贴的金额，并经历了显著的福利改善。

33497.title: A Family Affair: The Effects of College on Parent and Student Finances
33497.zh_title: 家庭事务：大学对父母和学生财务的影响
33497.authors: Palaash Bhargava, Sandra E. Black, Jeffrey T. Denning, Robert W. Fairlie, Oded Gurantz
33497.abstract: Paying for college is often a family affair, with both parents and students contributing. We study the effects of college on family finances using administrative data on the universe of federal aid applicants in California linked to credit records. We provide the first comprehensive analysis of how both students and their parents use debt with college attendance and how prices affect those decisions. We start by using an event-study framework to explore how parents’ use of debt and credit outcomes change after their child first submits a federal aid application for college enrollment. While total debt does not change, higher-income parents shift balances from other debt to educational loans. We find that lower-income parents take out more education loans, experience less delinquency on non-educational debt, and see their credit scores rise. We then use discontinuities in eligibility for generous financial aid to test how an exogenous change in the price of college affects parental debt and financial health. We find that parents finance increases in the price of college through educational loans as well as home equity loans. Higher prices increase parental delinquency on debt. The findings highlight an important channel by which college and its rising cost may spill over into the broader financial health of families and economy.
33497.zh_abstract: 支付大学费用通常是一个家庭事务，父母和学生都会做出贡献。我们利用与信用记录相关联的加州联邦援助申请者的行政数据，研究大学对家庭财务的影响。我们首次全面分析了学生及其父母如何因上大学而使用债务，以及价格如何影响这些决策。我们首先使用事件研究框架，探讨在孩子首次提交联邦援助申请以注册大学后，父母的债务使用和信用结果如何变化。虽然总债务没有变化，但高收入父母将余额从其他债务转移到教育贷款。我们发现，低收入父母借入更多教育贷款，非教育债务的违约率降低，信用评分上升。然后，我们利用获得慷慨财政援助资格的不连续性，来检验大学价格的外生变化如何影响父母的债务和财务健康。我们发现，父母通过教育贷款以及房屋净值贷款来为大学价格上涨提供资金。更高的价格增加了父母的债务违约率。这些发现突显了一个重要渠道，通过该渠道，大学及其不断上涨的成本可能会溢出到家庭和整个经济的更广泛财务健康中。

33496.title: Misperceptions of Nonlinear Budget Sets: Evidence from Administrative Tax Data
33496.zh_title: 对非线性预算集的误解：来自行政税收数据的证据
33496.authors: Alexander M. Gelber, Damon Jones, Ithai Lurie, Daniel W. Sacks
33496.abstract: Budget set kinks are much studied in economics, including in the context of “bunching” estimators that assume individuals react to the true marginal tax rate. We document that individuals disproportionately “left-bunch” below kinks in the context of the Social Security Earnings Test. We show that the left bunching in this case cannot be explained through standard, rational reactions to the incentives and instead find that a model of tax bracket misperception, where individuals mistake a kink in their budget set for a notch, provides a much better fit to the data. In the context of the Earnings Test, this misperception provides an explanation for why literature has found large earnings responses despite the fact that the Earnings Test typically creates weak incentives for rational agents to adjust earnings. More generally, if individuals perceive kinks as notches, then elasticities estimated from bunching at kinks where this misperception may be at play may be significantly over-estimated.
33496.zh_abstract: 预算集拐点在经济学中被广泛研究，包括在“聚集”估计量的背景下，该估计量假设个体对真实边际税率做出反应。我们记录了在社会安全收入测试的背景下，个体不成比例地在拐点下方“左侧聚集”。我们表明，在这种情况下，左侧聚集无法通过标准的、对激励的理性反应来解释，相反，我们发现一个税收等级误解模型——即个体将预算集中的拐点误认为是一个缺口——能更好地拟合数据。在收入测试的背景下，这种误解解释了为什么文献发现了巨大的收入反应，尽管收入测试通常为理性代理人调整收入创造了微弱的激励。更一般地说，如果个体将拐点视为缺口，那么从可能存在这种误解的拐点聚集处估计出的弹性可能会被显著高估。
33496.meta: Programs：AG, LS, PE；JEL：H20, H24, H55, J14, J22, J26
